usageNote: 最常用的礼貌邀请句型
example: Would you like to join us for dinner?

name: 建议-Why not
usageNote: why not后接动词原形，表建议
example: Why not try again?

name: 建议-Why don't you
usageNote: why don't you后接动词原形
example: Why don't you take a break?

name: 建议-How about/What about
example: How about going for a walk?

name: 建议-You'd better
template: You'd better + V / You'd better not + V
usageNote: had better表示建议，语气较直接
example: You'd better see a doctor.

name: 建议-Shall we
usageNote: shall we用于第一人称疑问句提建议
example: Shall we dance?

name: 祝愿-Good luck
template: Good luck / Good luck with + N
example: Good luck with your exam!

name: 祝愿-Best wishes
usageNote: 常用于书信结尾或节日祝福
example: Best wishes for the New Year!

name: 同意-I agree
template: I agree / I agree with + you/that
example: I agree with you on that point.

name: 同意-Exactly/That's right
usageNote: 表示完全同意对方的观点
example: Exactly! That's what I wanted to say.

name: 不同意-I don't think so
template: I don't think so. / I'm afraid not.
usageNote: 否定前移使语气更委婉
example: I don't think so. Let's check again.

name: 电话-This is...speaking
template: Hello, this is + 名字 + speaking.
usageNote: 打电话时说明自己是谁
example: Hello, this is John speaking.

name: 电话-Can I speak to
template: Can/May I speak to + 名字?
example: Can I speak to Mr. Smith, please?

name: 列举-Firstly/First
coreWords: first, firstly, second, secondly, third, thirdly
example: Firstly, it's too expensive. Secondly, it's not practical.

name: 列举-First of all
usageNote: 用于引出一系列观点的第一个
example: First of all, I'd like to thank everyone.

name: 列举-Finally/Lastly
template: Finally/Lastly/Last but not least, + 句子
coreWords: finally, lastly, last, but, not, least
usageNote: 用于列举最后一项，last but not least强调重要
example: Last but not least, I want to thank my parents.

name: 列举-for one thing...for another
example: For one thing, I have no time. For another, I have no money.

name: 递进-In addition
usageNote: in addition可独立使用或后接to
example: In addition, we need to consider the cost.

name: 递进-Besides
usageNote: besides作副词或介词，表递进关系
example: Besides, it's not my responsibility.

name: 递进-What's more/More than that
template: What's more, / More than that, + 句子
usageNote: 口语中常用的递进表达
example: It's raining, and what's more, it's getting colder.

name: 转折-However
template: ..., however, + 句子 / However, + 句子
usageNote: however可置于句首、句中或句末，用逗号隔开
example: However, I don't agree with you.

name: 转折-On the contrary
usageNote: 用于强烈否定前面的观点并提出相反意见
example: On the contrary, I think it's quite easy.

name: 转折-In contrast
template: In contrast, / By contrast, + 句子
usageNote: 用于对比两个不同的事物
example: In contrast, life in the city is much faster.

name: 转折-On the other hand
template: On the other hand, + 句子
usageNote: 用于引出问题的另一方面
example: On the one hand, it's cheap. On the other hand, it's poor quality.

name: 因果-As a result
template: As a result, / As a result of + N, + 句子
usageNote: as a result表结果，of后接原因
example: As a result, the plan was cancelled.

name: 举例-For example/instance
example: Many countries, for example Japan, have high life expectancy.

name: 举例-such as
template: such as + N(pl) / N + such as + N
usageNote: such as用于列举同类人或物中的几个
example: I like fruits such as apples and oranges.

name: 举例-take...for example
example: Take Tom for example. He studies very hard.

name: 解释-In other words
usageNote: 用于用不同的方式重述同一观点
example: In other words, we need more time.

name: 解释-That is to say/Namely
template: That is to say, / Namely, + 句子
usageNote: 用于进一步解释或澄清
example: Only one student passed, namely, Tom.

name: 总结-In conclusion
template: In conclusion, / To conclude, + 句子
usageNote: 用于文章或讲话的结尾
example: In conclusion, education is the key to success.

name: 总结-To sum up
template: To sum up, / In short, / In brief, + 句子
example: To sum up, we need to work together.

name: 总结-All in all
usageNote: all in all用于总体评价
example: All in all, it was a great trip.

name: 强调-Indeed/In fact
template: Indeed, / In fact, / As a matter of fact, + 句子
example: In fact, I have never been there.

name: 强调-Above all
usageNote: above all用于强调最重要的事
example: Above all, you must be honest.

name: 强调-Especially/Particularly
usageNote: especially/particularly用于强调某一具体例子
example: I like sports, especially football.

name: 条件衔接-In that case
function: 既然那样/假若是那样的话
usageNote: 用于根据前述条件得出结论
example: In that case, I'll come with you.

name: 条件衔接-Otherwise
usageNote: otherwise用于表示如果不这样做会产生的结果
example: Hurry up, otherwise you'll be late.

name: be going to-意图/计划
usageNote: 表示事先打算或有迹象表明即将发生
example: I am going to study medicine.

name: be about to-即将
usageNote: 表示即将发生的动作，时间非常近
example: The train is about to leave.

name: be to-安排/命令
usageNote: 表示正式的安排、命令或命中注定
example: You are to report for duty at 8.

name: be supposed to
usageNote: 表示期望、规定或被认为应该做的事
example: You are supposed to wear a seat belt.

name: be used to-习惯于
usageNote: be used to后接名词或动名词，表已适应的状态
example: I am used to getting up early.

name: used to-过去习惯
usageNote: 表示过去习惯性的动作或状态（现在已不）
example: I used to play football after school.

name: have/get something done
usageNote: 表示让某人做某事或经历某事
example: I had my hair cut yesterday.

name: have sb do
usageNote: have后接宾语+不带to的不定式
example: I had him repair my bike.

name: need doing
example: The car needs washing. = needs to be washed

name: be worth doing
usageNote: worth后接主动形式表被动意义
example: This book is worth reading.
variants: be worthy of being done/be worthy to be done

name: be busy doing
example: He is busy preparing for the exam.

name: be used for doing
example: A knife is used for cutting things.

name: be made of/from
template: Subj + be made of/from + 材料
usageNote: of看得出原材料，from看不出原材料
example: This table is made of wood. / Wine is made from grapes.

name: be made in
template: Subj + be made in + 地点
example: This car was made in Japan.

name: be made by
template: Subj + be made by + 人/方法
function: 由某人制造/用某种方法
usageNote: by后接动作的执行者或方法
example: This cake was made by my mother.

name: be covered with
example: The ground was covered with snow.

name: be filled with
example: The hall was filled with people.

name: be full of
usageNote: full of表充满某种特质或情感
example: The room is full of laughter.

name: be pleased with
example: She is pleased with her grades.

name: be surprised at/by
usageNote: at或by后接令人惊讶的对象
example: I was surprised at the news.

name: be interested in
example: I am interested in learning English.

name: It is no use/good doing
usageNote: it为形式主语，后接动名词
example: It is no use crying over spilt milk.
variants: There is no point in doing

name: There is no need to
template: There is no need to + V
usageNote: there be + no need + 不定式
example: There is no need to worry.

name: What/How about doing
usageNote: 用于提出建议或征求意见
example: What about going for a picnic?

name: Why not do
example: Why not ask the teacher?

name: had better do
template: Subj + had better + V / had better not + V
usageNote: had better语气较直接，表忠告
example: You had better leave now.

name: would rather do
template: Subj + would rather + V + than + V
example: I would rather walk than take a bus.

name: can't help doing
example: I couldn't help laughing.

name: can't wait to
example: I can't wait to see you.

name: feel like doing
example: I don't feel like eating anything.
variants: want to do/would like to do

name: look forward to doing
usageNote: to为介词，后接动名词或名词
example: I look forward to meeting you.

name: be accustomed to doing
example: I am accustomed to working late.

name: object to doing
example: Do you object to my smoking here?

name: devote...to doing
usageNote: to为介词，后接动名词或名词
example: She devoted her life to helping others.

name: prefer doing to doing
example: I prefer reading to watching TV.

name: prefer to do rather than do
template: Subj + prefer to + V + rather than + V
usageNote: prefer后接不定式，rather than后接动词原形
example: I prefer to walk rather than run.

name: spend time (in) doing
template: Subj + spend + 时间/金钱 + (in) + V-ing / on + N
example: I spent two hours (in) doing my homework.

name: have difficulty/trouble (in) doing
example: I had difficulty (in) solving the problem.

name: have fun (in) doing
template: Subj + have fun/a good time + (in) + V-ing
example: We had fun playing basketball.

name: prevent/stop/keep...from doing
usageNote: from后接动名词，stop/omit from时from可省
example: The rain prevented us from going out.

name: thanks to
example: Thanks to your help, I passed the exam.

name: according to
example: According to the news, it will rain.

name: as for/as to
template: As for/As to + N, + 句子
example: As for me, I prefer tea.

name: by means of
example: We solved the problem by means of a computer.

name: by way of
example: We went to Shanghai by way of Nanjing.

name: for the sake of
example: For the sake of your health, stop smoking.

name: on behalf of
usageNote: 表示代替某人或某组织
example: On behalf of the company, I thank you.

name: in place of
usageNote: in place of后接被替代的对象
example: She attended the meeting in place of her boss.

name: instead of
example: He stayed at home instead of going out.

name: in addition to
template: in addition to + N/V-ing, + 主句
usageNote: to为介词，后接名词或动名词
example: In addition to English, she learns French.

name: apart from
example: Apart from that, everything is fine.

name: as well as
usageNote: as well as连接并列成分，强调前者
example: She is clever as well as beautiful.

name: with the help of
example: With the help of the teacher, I made progress.

name: under the control of
usageNote: under表示处于某种状态或控制下
example: The area is under the control of the army.

name: in the charge of
usageNote: in the charge of表被动，in charge of表主动
example: The children are in the care of their aunt.

name: at the mercy of
usageNote: 表示完全受某人或某物控制
example: The ship was at the mercy of the waves.

name: for lack of
usageNote: 表示因缺少某物而导致
example: The project failed for lack of money.

name: at the cost/expense of
usageNote: 表示以牺牲某物为代价
example: He achieved success at the cost of his health.

name: at the risk of
example: He saved the child at the risk of his own life.

name: keep on doing
usageNote: keep on后接动名词，强调反复性
example: Keep on trying; you'll succeed.

name: carry on doing
example: Carry on working while I'm away.

name: insist on doing
example: He insisted on paying for dinner.

name: persist in doing
example: She persisted in asking questions.

name: succeed in doing
example: He succeeded in solving the problem.

name: be capable of doing
example: She is capable of speaking four languages.

name: be proud of
example: I am proud of my daughter.

name: be afraid of
example: She is afraid of flying.

name: be good at
example: He is good at playing chess.

name: be keen on
example: She is keen on photography.

name: be tired of
example: I am tired of waiting.

name: be aware of
example: Are you aware of the danger?

name: be responsible for
example: Who is responsible for this mistake?

name: apologize to sb for doing
template: Subj + apologize to + sb + for + V-ing
example: I apologized to her for being late.
variants: say sorry to sb for doing

name: congratulate sb on doing
example: I congratulated him on his success.

name: blame sb for doing
example: Don't blame me for your failure.

name: thank sb for doing
example: Thank you for helping me.
variants: be grateful to sb for doing

name: praise sb for doing
example: The teacher praised him for his honesty.

name: accuse sb of doing
example: He was accused of stealing money.

name: remind sb of sth
function: 提醒某人某事/使某人想起
usageNote: of后接提醒或想起的内容
example: This song reminds me of my childhood.

name: warn sb of/about sth
example: They warned us of the danger.

name: inform sb of sth
example: Please inform me of any changes.

name: rob sb of sth
example: The thief robbed her of her bag.

name: cheat sb of sth
example: He cheated me of my money.

name: convince sb of sth
example: I couldn't convince him of my innocence.

name: suspect sb of doing
example: They suspected him of lying.

name: a lot of
usageNote: 既可修饰可数名词也可修饰不可数名词，用于肯定句
example: A lot of students are absent today.

name: a lot
usageNote: 作状语修饰动词，表示程度或频率
example: Thanks a lot for your help.

name: a number of
usageNote: 后接可数名词复数，谓语动词用复数
example: A number of accidents happened on this road.

name: a couple of
example: I need a couple of minutes to finish this.

name: have the ability to
example: She has the ability to solve difficult problems.

name: be able to do
usageNote: 可用于各种时态，强调通过努力获得的能力
example: After practice, he was able to swim across the river.

name: be about to do
usageNote: 表示 imminent action，不与具体时间短语连用
example: The train is about to leave.
variants: be on the point of doing

name: What about...? / How about...?
usageNote: 用于口语中提建议，后接名词或动名词
example: What about going abroad for the summer holiday?

name: talk about
usageNote: 动词+介词搭配，about后接话题
example: They are talking about their adventure in Africa.

name: think about
usageNote: 表示思考某事或考虑做某事
example: Think about your answer before you speak.

name: above all
usageNote: 用于强调最重要的事物，常置于句首
example: Above all, you must be honest with yourself.

name: go abroad
example: Many students want to go abroad for further study.

name: from abroad
example: The product was imported from abroad.

name: accept an invitation
example: She accepted his invitation to the party.

name: by accident
usageNote: 介词短语作状语，相当于accidentally
example: I met my old friend by accident at the airport.

name: have an accident
example: He had an accident on his way to school.

name: according to
usageNote: 介词短语引导信息来源，to后不接从句
example: According to the weather forecast, it will rain tomorrow.

name: achieve one's goal
usageNote: achieve强调通过努力取得成功
example: Through hard work, he achieved his goal.

name: come across
usageNote: 动词短语，后可接人或物
example: I came across an old photo in the attic.

name: across from
example: The bank is across from the post office.

name: act as
example: She acted as an interpreter at the conference.

name: take action
usageNote: action常用单数，可加不定式表示目的
example: We must take action to protect the environment.

name: take an active part in
template: take an active part in + n./doing
example: She takes an active part in school activities.

name: add up to
usageNote: 动副介短语，后接数字或总量
example: The costs add up to more than a thousand dollars.

name: add to
example: The bad weather added to our difficulties.

name: add...to...
usageNote: 双宾语结构，A为被加物，B为对象
example: Please add some salt to the soup.

name: admire sb. for sth.
example: I admire her for her courage and determination.

name: take advantage of
usageNote: of后接被利用的人或事物
example: Take advantage of this opportunity to improve your skills.

name: go on an adventure
example: The boys went on an adventure in the forest.

name: give advice
example: Can you give me some advice on learning English?

name: ask for advice
example: If you are in trouble, ask for advice from your teachers.

name: take/follow one's advice
usageNote: take表示接受并按照建议行动
example: I took my father's advice and studied harder.

name: advise sb. to do
usageNote: advise后接宾语+不定式作宾补
example: The doctor advised him to have a good rest.

name: affect one's health
usageNote: affect为及物动词，直接接宾语
example: Smoking seriously affects your health.

name: afford to do
example: We can't afford to buy a new apartment.

name: be afraid of
example: Are you afraid of animals?

name: be afraid to do
example: She was afraid to speak in public.

name: I'm afraid (that)...
usageNote: 用于委婉表达不好的消息或拒绝
example: I'm afraid I can't attend the meeting tomorrow.

name: after all
template: after all, + 句子 / 句子 + after all
usageNote: 用于句首或句末，表示让步或解释
example: After all, he is only a child.

name: look after
example: Please look after your little sister.

name: run after
usageNote: 字面义为追赶，也可指追求
example: The dog ran after the cat.

name: be against
usageNote: against为介词，后接名词或动名词
example: Most people are against this plan.

name: against the law/rules
example: Driving without a license is against the law.

name: at the age of
template: at the age of + 数字
example: At the age of ten, he moved to America.

name: agree with
usageNote: with后接人或表示观点的词
example: I agree with you on this matter.

name: agree to do
example: She agreed to help me with my homework.

name: agree on
example: They agreed on a date for the meeting.

name: go ahead
usageNote: 常用于口语中给予许可
example: Go ahead and ask your question.

name: ahead of
usageNote: 可指时间或空间上的领先
example: He finished the work ahead of schedule.

name: ahead of time
example: She arrived at the airport ahead of time.

name: aim at
example: The program aims at helping young people find jobs.

name: aim to do
example: I aim to finish this book by Friday.
variants: intend to do, be aimed at doing

name: in the air
example: There is a feeling of excitement in the air.

name: by air
example: I prefer to travel by air.

name: look alike
example: The twins look alike but have different personalities.

name: keep alive
function: 使保持活着；使继续下去
example: The doctors worked hard to keep the patient alive.

name: all over
example: The news spread all over the school.

name: in all
example: There were fifty students in all.

name: first of all
example: First of all, let me introduce myself.

name: not at all
example: Thank you very much. — Not at all.

name: all of a sudden
example: All of a sudden, the lights went out.

name: after all
example: You should forgive him; after all, he is young.

name: allow sb. to do
example: My parents don't allow me to stay out late.

name: allow doing
example: The school doesn't allow smoking on campus.

name: along with
usageNote: 介词短语，后接伴随对象
example: She came to the party along with her friends.

name: get along with
example: Do you get along well with your classmates?

name: come along
example: Come along with us to the cinema.

name: read aloud
example: Please read the text aloud.

name: be amazed at/by
example: We were amazed at his rapid progress.
variants: be surprised at, be astonished at

name: be popular among
example: This song is very popular among teenagers.

name: a large amount of
template: a large amount of + 不可数n.
example: A large amount of money was spent on the project.
variants: a great deal of, plenty of

name: be amused at/by
usageNote: 被动结构，介词at/by引出原因
example: The children were amused by the clown's performance.

name: amuse oneself
example: He amused himself by drawing pictures.

name: ancient times
example: In ancient times, people lived in caves.

name: be angry with sb.
example: Don't be angry with me; I didn't mean it.

name: be angry about/at sth.
example: She was angry about the delay.

name: wild animal
example: The zoo has many wild animals from Africa.

name: announce to
usageNote: announce后接宣布的内容，to引出对象
example: The teacher announced the results to the class.

name: one another
example: They helped one another during the trip.

name: one after another
example: The buses came one after another.

name: another + 数词 + 复数n.
template: another + 数词 + 复数名词
example: We need another three days to finish.
variants: 数词 + more + 复数名词

name: answer the phone/door
example: Could you answer the phone? I'm busy.

name: be anxious about
example: Parents are often anxious about their children's safety.
variants: be worried about, be concerned about

name: be anxious to do
usageNote: 不定式表急切要做的事
example: She was anxious to hear the news.

name: anyway
usageNote: 用于句首或句末，转换话题
example: Anyway, let's get back to the main topic.

name: not...anywhere
example: I can't find my keys anywhere.

name: apart from
usageNote: 可表示包含或不包含，相当于besides/except
example: Apart from English, he can speak French.

name: apologize to sb. for sth.
example: I apologize to you for my mistake.
variants: say sorry to sb. for sth.

name: make an apology
template: make an apology (to sb. for sth.)
example: Please accept my sincere apology.

name: It appears that...
example: It appears that he has made the right decision.

name: appear to do
example: She appears to know the answer.

name: 时间介词-by the time
template: by the time + 从句，主句
usageNote: by the time引导时间状语从句
example: By the time we arrived, the film had started. | By the time you read this, I will be gone.
variants: by the time / by that time

name: fundamental to
function: 形容词+介词：对...根本性的
example: Trust is fundamental to friendship.

name: the more... the more
template: the + Adj[比较级] + 主句, the + Adj[比较级] + 从句
example: The more you read, the more you know.

name: the sooner the better
template: the + Adj/Adv[比较级] + 主句, the + Adj/Adv[比较级] + 从句
example: When shall we start? The sooner the better.

name: so good
function: 程度副词+形容词：如此...（以至于）
example: The story was so good that I read it twice.

name: so + adj + that
function: 程度副词构式：如此...以至于...
example: She was so happy that she cried.

name: That-引导主语从句
template: That + 陈述句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: 陈述事实/命题作为句子主语
usageNote: that在主语从句中不充当成分，无词义，仅起连接作用，一般不能省略。谓语动词常用单数。
example: That he passed the exam surprised everyone. / That she loves music is obvious.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It surprised everyone that he passed the exam.

name: What-引导主语从句
template: What + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: '所……的事物/内容'作为句子主语
usageNote: what在从句中充当主语、宾语或表语，相当于'the thing(s) that'。
example: What he said is true. / What I need is more time.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is true what he said.

name: Whether-引导主语从句
template: Whether + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: 表示'是否'的不确定性作为主语
usageNote: whether在主语从句中不充当成分，但有'是否'词义，不能用if替换。
example: Whether he will come is uncertain. / Whether she agrees matters a lot.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is uncertain whether he will come.

name: Who-引导主语从句
template: Who + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: '谁'作为从句主语并引导整个主语从句
usageNote: who在从句中充当主语，表示'谁'。
example: Who broke the window is unknown. / Who will win the match is hard to say.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is unknown who broke the window.

name: Which-引导主语从句
template: Which + 名词/代词 + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: '哪一个'作为从句中的限定词，引导主语从句
usageNote: which在从句中作定语，表示'哪一个'。
example: Which team will win is hard to say. / Which way we should go is still unclear.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is hard to say which team will win.

name: When-引导主语从句
template: When + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: '什么时候'引导从句作为主语
usageNote: when在从句中作时间状语，表示'何时'。
example: When they will arrive is not clear. / When the meeting starts depends on the boss.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is not clear when they will arrive.

name: Where-引导主语从句
template: Where + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
usageNote: where在从句中作地点状语，表示'何地'。
example: Where he lives is a secret. / Where they went remains unknown.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is a secret where he lives.

name: Why-引导主语从句
template: Why + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
usageNote: why在从句中作原因状语，表示'为什么'。
example: Why he left remains a mystery. / Why she cried puzzles everyone.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It remains a mystery why he left.

name: How-引导主语从句
template: How + 从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: '如何/怎样'引导从句作为主语
usageNote: how在从句中作方式状语，表示'如何'。
example: How he did it is amazing. / How she finished so quickly surprises us all.
variants: 可用it作形式主语：It is amazing how he did it.

name: It形式主语+that从句
template: It + be + adj./n. + that + 从句
function: 用it作形式主语，真正的主语是that从句，避免头重脚轻
usageNote: it无实义，仅作形式主语。that从句后置。注意主语从句中should型虚拟语气。
example: It is true that he passed the exam. / It is a pity that she can't come. / It is necessary that he (should) come early.
variants: It seems/happens/appears that... / It is said/reported/believed that...

name: That-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + that + 陈述句
function: 陈述事实/命题作为动词宾语
usageNote: that在宾语从句中不充当成分，无词义。在believe, think, hope, know, say等动词后that常可省略。
example: I know that he is honest. / She said (that) she would come. / I believe (that) you can do it.
variants: 在动词insist, order, suggest, demand等后可用虚拟语气：I suggest that he (should) come.

name: What-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + what + 从句
usageNote: what在从句中充当主语、宾语或表语。
example: I don't know what he wants. / Please tell me what happened. / I understand what you mean.

name: Whether/If-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + whether/if + 从句
function: 表示'是否'的疑问作为动词宾语
usageNote: whether和if均可引导宾语从句表示'是否'。但whether可与or not连用，可用于介词后，可与不定式连用，if则不能。
example: I wonder whether/if he will come. / I don't know whether he is right or not. / I haven't decided whether to go.

name: Who-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + who + 从句
usageNote: who在从句中充当主语，表示'谁'。
example: I asked who broke the window. / Can you tell me who is in charge? / I don't know who will come.
variants: whoever也可引导：I will give the prize to whoever wins.

name: Whom-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + whom + 从句
function: '谁'(宾格)引导从句作为动词宾语
usageNote: whom在从句中充当宾语。口语中常用who代替whom。
example: I don't know whom she met. / Can you tell me whom I should contact? / She asked whom he had invited.

name: Which-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + which + 从句
function: '哪一个'引导从句作为动词宾语
usageNote: which在从句中充当定语或主语/宾语，表示'哪一个'。
example: I don't know which book to choose. / Can you tell me which team won? / I asked which way they went.
variants: whichever也可引导：Take whichever you like.

name: When-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + when + 从句
function: '何时'引导从句作为动词宾语
example: Can you tell me when they will leave? / I don't know when she arrived. / Ask him when he will be back.
variants: whenever也可引导：I will visit you whenever I can.

name: Where-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + where + 从句
function: '何地'引导从句作为动词宾语
example: Do you know where he lives? / I asked where she had put the key. / Show me where you found it.
variants: wherever也可引导：Go wherever you like.

name: Why-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + why + 从句
function: '为什么'引导从句作为动词宾语
example: I don't understand why he left. / Can you explain why you were late? / I wonder why she refused.

name: How-引导宾语从句
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + how + 从句
function: '如何/怎样'引导从句作为动词宾语
usageNote: how在从句中作方式状语，可与many/much/long/old等连用。
example: Can you show me how to do it? / I don't know how he managed it. / Tell me how old you are.
variants: however也可引导：I will do it however I can.

name: 宾语从句+间接引语时态呼应
template: 主语 + said/knew/thought + that + 过去时/过去完成时
function: 间接引语中时态的后移
usageNote: 主句为过去时，宾语从句通常要相应改变时态：一般现在→一般过去；一般过去→过去完成；现在完成→过去完成；一般将来→过去将来。
example: He said that he was tired. / She said she had finished her work. / He told me he would come.
variants: 客观真理时态不变：He said that the earth is round.

name: 宾语从句用于疑问句
template: 疑问词 + 助动词 + 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语从句?
coreWords: what, where, when, why, how, who, which, whether, if
function: 将宾语从句嵌入疑问句中
usageNote: 宾语从句本身用陈述语序，主句用疑问语序。
example: Do you know what he wants? / Can you tell me where he lives? / Have you decided whether you will go?
variants: why don't you know where he is?

name: That-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be/linking verb + that + 从句
function: 陈述事实/命题作为表语
usageNote: that在表语从句中不充当成分，一般不能省略。
example: The problem is that we don't have enough time. / My idea is that we should start early.

name: What-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be + what + 从句
usageNote: what在从句中充当成分，相当于'the thing(s) that'。
example: That's what I need. / This is what he told me. / Home is what you make it.

name: Whether-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be + whether + 从句
example: The question is whether he will come. / The problem is whether we can finish on time.

name: Where-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be + where + 从句
example: This is where I was born. / That's where the trouble lies. / The park is where we usually meet.
variants: Home is where the heart is.

name: Why-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be + why + 从句
example: That is why I left. / This is why we failed. / That is why she cried.

name: How/When/Who-引导表语从句
template: 主语 + be + how/when/who + 从句
function: 引导表语从句说明主语的具体内容
usageNote: 疑问词在从句中充当相应成分。
example: The problem is how we can solve it. / That was when I first met her. / The winner is whoever gets the most votes.

name: Because-引导表语从句
function: 解释原因，表示'这是因为……'
usageNote: because引导表语从句时，主语通常为this/that/it，用于回答why问句。
example: That's because he didn't study hard. / It is because I care about you.
variants: The reason... is because... (较口语化，规范用法应为The reason is that...)

name: That-引导同位语从句
function: 解释说明前面抽象名词的具体内容
usageNote: that在同位语从句中不充当成分，不能省略。常用于fact, news, idea, belief, hope, doubt, truth等抽象名词后。
example: The fact that he passed the exam pleased his parents. / The news that they won spread quickly.
variants: 与定语从句区别：that在定语从句中充当成分，在同位语从句中不充当成分。

name: Whether-引导同位语从句
function: 表示疑问/不确定性的同位语
example: We haven't settled the question whether we will go. / There is some doubt whether he will come.
variants: no doubt that... (肯定) / doubt whether... (不确定)

name: 同位语从句与定语从句辨析
template: 名词 + that + 从句(同位语从句/定语从句)
function: 区分同位语从句(说明内容)与定语从句(限定修饰)
usageNote: 同位语从句中that不充当成分，仅连接；定语从句中that充当主语或宾语。同位语从句前名词为抽象名词(fact/news/idea等)。
example: The news that he told me was exciting.(定语从句，that作宾语) / The news that he won excited us.(同位语从句，that不作成分)
variants: 抽象名词后多为同位语从句，具体名词后多为定语从句。

name: Who-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人) + who + 从句
function: 限定修饰人，who在从句中作主语
usageNote: who指人，在定语从句中充当主语，不能省略。
example: The man who lives next door is a doctor. / The student who won the prize is my friend.

name: That-引导限定性定语从句(指人)
template: 先行词(人) + that + 从句
function: 限定修饰人，that在从句中作主语或宾语
usageNote: that可指人也可指物，在从句中作主语或宾语，作宾语时可省略。
example: The boy that sits there is Tom. / The girl (that) I met is kind.
variants: that可与who互换(指人时)，但与which不能互换

name: That-引导限定性定语从句(指物)
template: 先行词(物) + that + 从句
function: 限定修饰物，that在从句中作主语或宾语
usageNote: that指物时，可与which互换。但当先行词为all, everything, nothing, something, anything, little, much, the only, the very, the same等时，常用that。
example: The book that I bought is interesting. / All that glitters is not gold. / This is the very book that I need.
variants: 先行词既有人又有物时，只能用that。

name: Which-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(物) + which + 从句
function: 限定修饰物，which在从句中作主语或宾语
usageNote: which指物，在从句中作主语或宾语，作宾语时可省略。
example: The book which I bought yesterday is interesting. / The bike which was stolen was new.

name: Whose-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人/物) + whose + 名词 + 从句
function: 表示所属关系，whose在从句中作定语
usageNote: whose既可指人也可指物，在从句中作定语，后接名词。指物时可用of which代替。
example: The girl whose father is a teacher is my friend. / I know a man whose name is Li. / The house whose roof is red belongs to my aunt.
variants: The house of which the roof is red = The house the roof of which is red

name: Whom-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人) + whom + 从句
usageNote: whom是who的宾格，在从句中充当宾语，口语中常用who或that代替，也可省略。
example: The man whom I met yesterday is kind. / The boy (whom) you saw is my brother.

name: 介词+Which-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词 + 介词 + which + 从句
usageNote: 介词的选择取决于从句中动词或形容词的固定搭配。介词可前置(正式)或后置(介词放在从句末尾)。
example: The school in which I studied is small. / The pen with which I write is new. / The house in which he lives is big.
variants: 介词后置：The school (which) I studied in is small.

name: 介词+Whom-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人) + 介词 + whom + 从句
usageNote: 介词的选择取决于从句中动词或形容词的固定搭配。口语中常用who/that代替。
example: The man with whom I talked is friendly. / The girl to whom I spoke was shy.
variants: 介词后置：The man (whom) I talked with is friendly.

name: Where-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(地点) + where + 从句
usageNote: where = in/at which。先行词为表示地点的名词，如place, house, school, village, city等。
example: This is the house where I was born. / I know a place where we can rest. / The city where he lives is beautiful.
variants: This is the house in which I was born. / This is the house (that/which) I was born in.

name: When-引导限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(时间) + when + 从句
usageNote: when = in/on/at/during which。先行词为表示时间的名词，如day, time, year, moment, period等。
example: I remember the day when we first met. / Do you know the time when the train leaves? / The year when I was born was 2006.
variants: I remember the day on which we first met.

name: Why-引导限定性定语从句
usageNote: why = for which。先行词通常为reason。
example: That is the reason why I left. / The reason why he was late is unclear. / I don't know the reason why she cried.
variants: That is the reason (that/which) I left for. / That is the reason for which I left.

name: The way-引导定语从句
usageNote: the way作先行词时，定语从句可用that, in which引导，也可省略关系词。
example: The way (that/in which) he solved the problem was clever. / I don't like the way he talks.

name: 限定性定语从句关系词省略
template: 先行词 + (关系词) + 从句(关系词作宾语/表语)
function: 关系代词作宾语或表语时可省略
usageNote: 关系代词在定语从句中充当宾语或表语时可以省略，作主语时不能省略。
example: The book (that) I bought is good. / The man (whom) I saw was tall. / He is not the boy (that) he used to be.
variants: 非正式文体中省略更常见。

name: Who-引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人) + , + who + 从句 + ,
function: 对先行词作补充说明，不用来限定
usageNote: 非限定性定语从句与先行词之间用逗号隔开，不能用that引导。who在从句中作主语。
example: My mother, who is 60, still works hard. / Tom, who came late, missed the bus.

name: Which-引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(物/整个主句) + , + which + 从句
function: 对先行词或整个主句作补充说明
usageNote: which可指物，也可指代前面整个主句的意思。不可用that代替。
example: The book, which was written in 1950, is still popular. / He failed the exam, which made his parents angry.
variants: which指代整个主句时，不能用that。

name: Where-引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(地点) + , + where + 从句
usageNote: 先行词为地点名词，从句前有逗号。
example: Beijing, where I was born, is a beautiful city. / He visited the small town, where he spent his childhood.

name: When-引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(时间) + , + when + 从句
usageNote: 先行词为时间名词，从句前有逗号。
example: Last Sunday, when I was free, I visited the park. / In 2020, when the pandemic began, life changed.

name: Whose-引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词(人/物) + , + whose + 名词 + 从句
function: 对先行词的所属关系作补充说明
usageNote: whose在非限定性定语从句中作定语。
example: Li Ming, whose father is a doctor, is my classmate. / I visited the museum, whose history is over 100 years.
variants: 可用of which代替(指物时)：the museum, the history of which is over 100 years

name: As-引导非限定性定语从句(固定搭配)
template: As + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + , + as + 从句
function: '正如/就像'，引导非限定性定语从句
usageNote: as在从句中作主语、宾语或表语。常见搭配：as we all know, as is known to all, as is often the case, as was expected。
example: As we all know, the earth is round. / As is known to all, China is a developing country. / He failed, as was expected.
variants: as可置于句首、句中或句末；which不能置于句首。

name: Which与As引导非限定性定语从句辨析
usageNote: which只能指代前面主句的意思，不能指代后面将要说的内容。as可指代后面主句的意思，可置于句首。
example: He failed the exam, which was natural. / As was expected, he failed the exam. / He married her, as/which was natural.

name: Which/Whom在介词后引导非限定性定语从句
template: 先行词 + , + 介词 + which/whom + 从句
function: 介词+关系代词在非限定性定语从句中作状语
usageNote: 介词不能后置。which/whom不可用that/who代替。
example: The manager, to whom I spoke, was very kind. / The building, in which the meeting was held, was old.

name: 关系代词+不定式
template: 先行词 + 关系代词 + to do
coreWords: what, which, who, whom, how, where, when, whether
function: 关系代词+不定式构成定语从句的紧缩形式
usageNote: 相当于一个定语从句：'关系代词+主语+should/would+动词原形'。
example: I have no one to talk to. / He has a lot of work to do. / Please give me a pen to write with.
variants: I have no one (whom I can) to talk to.

name: 分隔定语从句
template: 先行词 + 其他成分 + 关系词 + 从句
function: 先行词与定语从句被其他成分隔开
usageNote: 定语从句与先行词之间被介词短语、副词等成分隔开，需正确识别先行词。
example: A new teacher will come tomorrow who will teach us English. / There is a man at the door who wants to see you.
variants: 常用于there be句型或主语较长时

name: 双重限定性定语从句
template: 先行词 + 定语从句A + 定语从句B
function: 两个定语从句同时修饰一个先行词
usageNote: 两个定语从句并列或嵌套修饰同一个先行词。
example: The man who spoke to me and who gave me the book is my uncle. / This is the book that I bought and that I like very much.
variants: 可用and连接两个定语从句

name: That只能用不能用Which的情况
template: 先行词(all/everything/nothing/only/very/same/最高级/序数词) + that + 从句
function: 特定先行词只能用that引导定语从句
usageNote: 当先行词为all, everything, nothing, something, anything, little, much, the only, the very, the same, 最高级, 序数词时，常用that。
example: All that I want is peace. / This is the best film that I have ever seen. / He is the very man that I want to see.
variants: 先行词既有人又有物时，只能用that。

name: 定语从句主谓一致
template: 先行词(集体名词) + who/which + 谓语(单/复数)
function: 定语从句谓语的单复数取决于先行词
usageNote: 关系代词在从句中作主语时，谓语动词的单复数要与先行词保持一致。one of + 复数名词 + who(复数)；the only one of + 复数名词 + who(单数)。
example: He is one of the boys who are good at English. / He is the only one of the boys who is good at English.
variants: the only one / the very one + who + 单数谓语

name: When-时间状语从句
template: When + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + when + 从句
usageNote: when引导的从句谓语可以是延续性动词或短暂性动词。主句和从句时态视语境而定。
example: When I got home, my mother was cooking. / I was reading when he came in. / Be careful when you cross the street.
variants: When + 一般过去时, 主句 + 过去进行时/一般过去时

name: While-时间状语从句
template: While + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + while + 从句
function: '当……时/与此同时'，表示两个动作同时发生
usageNote: while从句谓语必须是延续性动词，常用进行时态。可表示对比。
example: While I was reading, he was watching TV. / Some people like coffee, while others prefer tea. / Strike while the iron is hot.
variants: While + 进行时, 主句 + 进行时/一般时

name: As-时间状语从句
template: As + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + as + 从句
function: '随着/当……时'，表示两个动作同时进行
usageNote: as强调'一边……一边……'或'随着'。从句谓语常为延续性动词。
example: As time goes by, we grow older. / As I walked along, I thought about my future. / The boy sang as he worked.
variants: As + 一般现在时(表示渐进变化)

name: Before-时间状语从句
template: Before + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + before + 从句
usageNote: before从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时。主句发生在从句之前。
example: Before I came here, I lived in Beijing. / Think twice before you act. / It will be some time before we know the truth.
variants: It + will be + 时间段 + before...

name: After-时间状语从句
template: After + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + after + 从句
usageNote: after从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时。
example: After he finished his work, he went home. / I will call you after I arrive. / After the rain stopped, we went out.

name: Since-时间状语从句
template: 主句(现在完成时) + since + 从句(一般过去时)
function: '自从……以来'，表示从过去某时持续到现在
usageNote: 主句常用现在完成时或现在完成进行时，从句用一般过去时。since在从句中可作时间状语。
example: I have lived here since I was born. / She has worked here since she graduated. / It is ten years since I left school.
variants: It is/has been + 时间段 + since + 一般过去时

name: Until/Till-时间状语从句
template: 主句(延续性/否定) + until/till + 从句
usageNote: 主句为肯定句时，谓语动词须为延续性动词；主句为否定句时(not...until)，谓语动词可为短暂性动词。until较正式，till较口语。
example: Wait here until I come back. / I didn't leave until he returned. / He worked until it got dark.
variants: Not until... + 倒装：Not until he returned did I leave.

name: As soon as-时间状语从句
template: As soon as + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + as soon as + 从句
function: '一……就……'，表示两个动作紧接发生
usageNote: as soon as从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时。
example: As soon as I arrive, I'll call you. / He left as soon as he heard the news. / Come here as soon as you finish.

name: The moment-时间状语从句
template: The moment + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + the moment + 从句
usageNote: the moment, the minute, the instant等名词短语可作连词，引导时间状语从句。
example: The moment I saw her, I knew something was wrong. / He called me the minute he arrived.
variants: The minute / The instant / The second + 从句

name: Every time-时间状语从句
template: Every time + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + every time + 从句
usageNote: every time, each time, next time, the first time等名词短语可作连词引导时间状语从句。
example: Every time I see her, she is smiling. / Each time he comes, he brings gifts. / The first time I met him, he was shy.
variants: Next time you come, please call first.

name: Once-时间状语从句
template: Once + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + once + 从句
usageNote: once强调'一旦做了某事，就……'，从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时。
example: Once you begin, you must continue. / Once you start, you can't stop. / Once he makes a promise, he keeps it.
variants: Once + 过去分词/形容词(省略主语和be)：Once (you are) in Beijing, visit the Great Wall.

name: Whenever-时间状语从句
template: Whenever + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + whenever + 从句
usageNote: whenever = at any time when。引导让步或时间状语从句。
example: Whenever I visit, she welcomes me warmly. / Come whenever you like. / Whenever it rains, I feel sad.

name: Hardly/Scarcely...when-时间状语从句
template: Hardly/Scarcely + had + 主语 + done + when + 从句(一般过去时)
function: '刚……就……'，表示两个动作紧接发生
usageNote: Hardly/Scarcely...when中，主句用过去完成时，从句用一般过去时。Hardly/Scarcely位于句首时主句部分倒装。
example: Hardly had I arrived when it began to rain. / Scarcely had she gone to bed when the phone rang.
variants: 倒装：Hardly had + 主语 + done + when...

name: No sooner...than-时间状语从句
template: No sooner + had + 主语 + done + than + 从句(一般过去时)
usageNote: No sooner...than中，主句用过去完成时，从句用一般过去时。No sooner位于句首时主句部分倒装。
example: No sooner had I left than the phone rang. / No sooner had he arrived than he started working.
variants: 倒装：No sooner had + 主语 + done + than...

name: Where-地点状语从句
template: Where + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + where + 从句
usageNote: where引导地点状语从句，在从句中充当地点状语。注意与定语从句where的区别：状语从句无先行词。
example: Where there is a will, there is a way. / Put the book where it was. / I found him where I left him.

name: Wherever-地点状语从句
template: Wherever + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + wherever + 从句
usageNote: wherever = in/at any place where。引导地点状语从句或让步状语从句。
example: Wherever you go, I will follow. / Sit wherever you like. / Wherever he goes, he makes friends.

name: Because-原因状语从句
template: 主句 + because + 从句 / Because + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: because语气最强，常回答why。可用于强调句型。不能与so连用。
example: I stayed at home because it rained. / Because he was ill, he didn't come. / It was because he was tired that he left early.
variants: not...because(否定转移)：I didn't buy it because it was cheap.(不是因为便宜才买)

name: Since-原因状语从句
template: Since + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + since + 从句
usageNote: since语气较弱，表示对方已知的原因或显而易见的原因。常译为'既然'。
example: Since you are busy, I won't trouble you. / Since everyone is here, let's begin. / Since it is late, we should go home.

name: As-原因状语从句
template: As + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + as + 从句
function: '由于/因为'，表示附带说明的原因
usageNote: as语气较弱，表示附带说明的原因，常译为'由于'。从句多置于句首。
example: As it was getting late, we went home. / As he was not ready, we went without him. / We went home, as it was late.

name: Now that-原因状语从句
template: Now that + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + now that + 从句
function: '既然/由于'，表示新出现的原因
usageNote: now that表示'既然现在……'，强调情况的变化。
example: Now that you are grown up, you should be independent. / Now that you mention it, I do remember. / Now that spring has come, the flowers bloom.
variants: that可省略：Now (that) you are here, let's start.

name: 原因状语从句引导词辨析
function: 区分四个原因引导词的语气强弱
usageNote: because语气最强(直接原因，回答why)；since次之(已知原因，'既然')；as较弱(附带说明)；now that表示新情况。
example: I didn't go because I was tired. / Since you insist, I'll go. / As it was raining, we stayed in. / Now that you know, tell others.
variants: for也可表原因(并列连词，语气最弱，不置于句首)：He must be ill, for he didn't come.

name: If-真实条件状语从句
template: If + 从句(一般现在时) + , + 主句(将来时/祈使句/情态动词)
usageNote: if引导真实条件句时，从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时(主将从现)。主句用一般将来时、祈使句或情态动词+动词原形。
example: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home. / If you see him, tell him to call me. / If you work hard, you can succeed.
variants: If + 现在完成时, 主句 + 将来时/情态动词：If you have finished, you may go.

name: If-虚拟条件状语从句(与现在相反)
template: If + 主语 + were/过去式 + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + do
coreWords: if(conj.), were(v.), would(modal), should(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
usageNote: 从句用一般过去时(be动词用were)，主句用would/should/could/might + 动词原形。
example: If I were you, I would go. / If he knew the truth, he would tell us. / If I had time, I would help you.
variants: 省略if倒装：Were I you, I would go.

name: If-虚拟条件状语从句(与过去相反)
template: If + 主语 + had done + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + have done
coreWords: if(conj.), had(aux.), would(modal), should(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
usageNote: 从句用过去完成时(had done)，主句用would/should/could/might + have done。
example: If I had known, I would have come. / If he had studied harder, he would have passed. / If she had been careful, she wouldn't have made the mistake.
variants: 省略if倒装：Had I known, I would have come.

name: If-虚拟条件状语从句(与将来相反)
template: If + 主语 + should do/were to do/过去式 + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + do
coreWords: if(conj.), should(modal), were(v.), would(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
usageNote: 从句用should do(可能性较大)、were to do(可能性较小)或一般过去时。主句用would/should/could/might + do。
example: If it should rain tomorrow, we would cancel the trip. / If he were to come, what should we do? / If I saw him tomorrow, I would tell him.
variants: 省略if倒装：Should it rain, we would stay home. / Were he to come, what should we do?

name: Unless-条件状语从句
template: 主句 + unless + 从句 / Unless + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: unless = if not。引导条件状语从句时，从句用一般现在时代替一般将来时。
example: I won't go unless you go with me. / Unless you study hard, you will fail. / You can't succeed unless you try.
variants: unless = if...not：I won't go if you don't go with me.

name: As/So long as-条件状语从句
template: As/So long as + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + as/so long as + 从句
usageNote: as/so long as强调充分条件，只要满足条件就会产生结果。
example: You can succeed as long as you work hard. / So long as you are happy, I am happy. / I will help you as long as you ask politely.
variants: as long as也可引导时间状语从句，表示'长达……之久'

name: Provided/Providing that-条件状语从句
template: Provided/Providing that + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + provided/providing that + 从句
example: I will help you provided that you ask me politely. / Providing (that) the weather is fine, we will go out.

name: Suppose/Supposing that-条件状语从句
usageNote: suppose/supposing that引导条件状语从句，常用于疑问句中。
example: Supposing that he doesn't come, what shall we do? / Suppose it rains, what then? / Supposing you won the prize, how would you feel?

name: On condition that-条件状语从句
template: 主句 + on condition that + 从句
usageNote: on condition that较正式，that可省略。
example: I will lend you the book on condition that you return it on time. / He agreed to help on condition that we paid him.
variants: on condition that = provided that = if

name: In case-条件状语从句
template: 主句 + in case + 从句 / In case + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: in case引导条件状语从句时，表示'以防万一'。in case也可引导目的状语从句。从句常用一般现在时或should。
example: Take an umbrella in case it rains. / In case he comes, tell him to wait. / I took money in case I needed it.
variants: in case of + 名词：Take an umbrella in case of rain.

name: Only if-条件状语从句
template: 主句 + only if + 从句 / Only if + 从句 + 倒装主句
function: '只有在……条件下才'，表示必要条件
usageNote: only if强调条件的唯一性，位于句首时主句需部分倒装。与if only(但愿)区分。
example: I will go only if you go too. / Only if you work hard can you pass. / He will succeed only if he tries.
variants: Only if位于句首：Only if you work hard can you succeed.(部分倒装)

name: If only-感叹/虚拟条件
template: If only + 主语 + 过去式/过去完成式!
usageNote: if only引导虚拟条件句，表示与事实相反的愿望。对现在虚拟用过去式；对过去虚拟用过去完成式。可独立成句。
example: If only I were rich! / If only I had studied harder! / If only she knew the truth!
variants: If only = I wish + that从句

name: Although/Though-让步状语从句
template: Although/Though + 从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + although/though + 从句
usageNote: although/though引导让步状语从句，不能与but连用，但可与yet/still连用。although较正式，though较口语。though可用于句末。
example: Although he is poor, he is happy. / Though it was raining, we went out. / He is poor. He is happy, though.
variants: though可置于句末：It was hard work. I enjoyed it, though.

name: Even if/Even though-让步状语从句
template: Even if/Even though + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: even if表示假设的情况(未必真实)；even though表示已知的事实。语气比although/though更强。
example: Even if it rains, I will go out. / Even though he was tired, he kept working. / I will help you even if you don't ask.
variants: even if = even though(有时可互换)

name: Whatever-让步状语从句
template: Whatever + 名词/从句 + , + 主句 / 主句 + whatever + 从句
function: '无论什么/不管什么'，表示无条件让步
usageNote: whatever = no matter what。在从句中充当主语、宾语或定语。
example: Whatever you do, I will support you. / Whatever happens, stay calm. / You can choose whatever you like.
variants: whatever + 名词：Whatever difficulties you face, don't give up.

name: Whenever-让步状语从句
usageNote: whenever = no matter when。引导让步状语从句。
example: Whenever you come, you are welcome. / Whenever it rains, I feel sad. / You are welcome whenever you visit.

name: Wherever-让步状语从句
function: '无论在哪里'，表示无条件让步
usageNote: wherever = no matter where。引导让步状语从句。
example: Wherever you go, keep in touch. / Wherever he goes, he makes friends. / Go wherever you like.

name: Whoever-让步状语从句
function: '无论谁/不管谁'，表示无条件让步
usageNote: whoever = no matter who。在从句中充当主语。
example: Whoever you are, you must obey the rules. / Whoever comes, show them in. / I will talk to whoever is in charge.

name: However-让步状语从句
template: However + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语 + , + 主句
function: '无论多么/不管怎样'，表示程度让步
usageNote: however = no matter how。后接形容词或副词。
example: However hard it is, don't give up. / However fast he runs, he can't catch the bus. / However tired you are, finish your work.
variants: however + adj./adv. + 主语 + 谓语

name: Whichever-让步状语从句
template: Whichever + 名词 + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: whichever = no matter which。在从句中充当定语或主语/宾语。
example: Whichever way you go, you will reach the village. / Whichever book you choose, I will buy it. / Take whichever you prefer.

name: No matter + wh-词-让步状语从句
template: No matter + what/who/how/when/where/which/whether + 从句 + , + 主句
coreWords: no(ad.), matter(v./n.), what, who, how, when, where, which, whether
usageNote: no matter + wh-词 = wh-词 + ever。两者可互换，但no matter wh-不能引导主语从句和宾语从句。
example: No matter what happens, stay calm. / No matter who you are, obey the rules. / No matter how hard it is, try your best.

name: Whether...or...-让步状语从句
template: Whether + 从句A + or + 从句B + , + 主句
usageNote: whether...or...引导让步状语从句，表示'不管是A还是B'。
example: Whether you like it or not, you must do it. / Whether it rains or shines, I will go. / Whether he comes or not, we will start.

name: As引导让步状语从句(倒装)
template: 形容词/副词/名词/动词 + as + 主语 + 谓语 + , + 主句
usageNote: as引导让步状语从句时必须倒装：将表语(形容词/名词)、状语(副词)或动词原形置于as之前。名词前不加冠词。
example: Young as he is, he knows a lot. / Hard as he tried, he failed. / Child as he is, he speaks English well. / Try as he might, he couldn't open it.

name: While-让步状语从句
usageNote: while引导让步状语从句时，强调前后对比。多用于句首。
example: While I understand your point, I don't agree. / While he is lazy, his brother is hard-working. / While I like him, I don't trust him.
variants: while引导让步从句时多表示对比

name: So that-目的状语从句
template: 主句 + so that + 从句(有情态动词can/could/may/might/will/would)
usageNote: so that引导目的状语从句时，从句中常有情态动词can, could, may, might, will, would等。so that也可引导结果状语从句(从句无情态动词)。
example: I got up early so that I could catch the bus. / She spoke slowly so that everyone could hear. / He runs fast so that he can win.
variants: so that可置于句中，不用逗号隔开

name: In order that-目的状语从句
template: 主句 + in order that + 从句(有情态动词)
usageNote: in order that较正式，可置于句首或句中。从句常有情态动词。
example: He spoke slowly in order that everyone could hear. / In order that you may understand, I will explain again. / I studied hard in order that I might pass.
variants: in order that = so that(较正式)

name: In case-目的状语从句
template: 主句 + in case + 从句
usageNote: in case引导目的状语从句时，表示'以防某种情况发生'。可译为'免得/以防'。
example: Take an umbrella in case it rains. / I wrote down the address in case I forgot it. / He took money in case he needed it.
variants: in case of + 名词：Take an umbrella in case of rain.

name: For fear that-目的状语从句
template: 主句 + for fear that + 从句(常有情态动词might/should)
usageNote: for fear that表示'生怕/唯恐'，从句中常用might/should。
example: She locked the door for fear that someone might enter. / He spoke quietly for fear that he should wake the baby. / I hid the letter for fear that she might see it.
variants: for fear that = lest(较正式/古体)

name: Lest-目的状语从句
template: 主句 + lest + 从句(should + do / 动词原形)
usageNote: lest较正式/文学化，从句常用should do或动词原形(美式英语)。
example: He ran fast lest he should miss the train. / She spoke quietly lest she wake the baby. / I wrote it down lest I forget.
variants: lest = for fear that = in case

name: So...that-结果状语从句
template: 主语 + be/助动词 + so + 形容词/副词 + that + 从句
usageNote: so后接形容词或副词。当so + adj./adv.位于句首时，主句需部分倒装。
example: He was so tired that he fell asleep immediately. / She speaks so fast that I can't follow. / So fast does he run that I can't catch up.

name: Such...that-结果状语从句
template: 主语 + be/动词 + such + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + that + 从句
usageNote: such后接(a/an) + 形容词 + 名词。当such位于句首时，主句需部分倒装。
example: It was such a boring film that I fell asleep. / They are such good students that teachers love them. / Such was the force that all the windows broke.
variants: such + 不可数名词/复数名词(不加a/an)：such fine weather that...

name: So that-结果状语从句
template: 主句 + so that + 从句(无情态动词)
function: '以至于/结果是'，表示自然结果
usageNote: so that引导结果状语从句时，从句中一般没有情态动词。常用逗号与主句隔开。
example: I didn't sleep well, so that I felt tired all day. / He didn't study hard, so that he failed. / It rained heavily, so that we stayed indoors.
variants: so that表结果时前面常有逗号

name: So...that结果状语从句倒装
template: So + 形容词/副词 + 助动词 + 主语 + 谓语 + that + 从句
usageNote: 当so + adj./adv.位于句首时，主句需部分倒装(将助动词/be动词/情态动词置于主语之前)。
example: So fast did he run that I couldn't catch up. / So tired was he that he fell asleep at once. / So loudly did he speak that everyone heard.
variants: Such + 名词位于句首：Such was his anger that he couldn't speak.

name: Than-比较状语从句
template: 主语 + 比较级 + than + 从句
usageNote: than引导比较状语从句。从句常省略与主句相同的成分。
example: He is taller than I am. / She runs faster than he does. / I have more books than you. / He knows more than I thought.
variants: than后可用主格或宾格：He is taller than me/I.

name: As...as-比较状语从句(同级肯定)
template: 主语 + be/动词 + as + 形容词/副词原级 + as + 从句
usageNote: as...as表示'和……一样'，中间用形容词或副词原级。否定形式为not as/so...as。
example: She is as kind as her mother. / He runs as fast as I do. / This room is as big as that one.
variants: as + many/much/few/little + 名词 + as：I have as many books as you.

name: Not as/so...as-比较状语从句(同级否定)
template: 主语 + be/动词 + not + as/so + 形容词/副词原级 + as + 从句
usageNote: not as...as和not so...as同义，表示'不如……'。so...as多用于否定句。
example: This book is not as/so interesting as that one. / He doesn't run as fast as I do. / She is not so tall as her sister.
variants: not half as...as：He is not half as clever as you.

name: The more...the more-比较状语从句
template: The + 比较级 + 从句/短语 + , + the + 比较级 + 主句
usageNote: the more...the more结构中，前面的the + 比较级相当于条件状语从句，后面的相当于主句。
example: The more you read, the more you know. / The harder you work, the more progress you will make. / The earlier you start, the sooner you finish.
variants: The + 比较级 + 主语 + 谓语, the + 比较级 + 主语 + 谓语

name: A is to B what C is to D-比较状语从句
template: A + is to + B + what + C + is to + D
usageNote: what引导比较状语从句，表示类比关系。
example: Air is to man what water is to fish. / Reading is to the mind what exercise is to the body. / A teacher is to students what a captain is to a ship.

name: As if/As though-方式比较状语从句(虚拟)
template: 主语 + 动词 + as if/though + 从句(虚拟语气/陈述语气)
function: '好像/仿佛'，表示方式或虚拟比较
usageNote: as if/though引导方式状语从句，可与虚拟语气或陈述语气连用。与现在事实相反用过去式；与过去事实相反用过去完成式。
example: He talks as if he knew everything. / He looked as if he had seen a ghost. / It looks as if it is going to rain.(可能真实)
variants: as if/though = like(非正式，后接名词/代词)

name: As-方式状语从句
template: 主句 + as + 从句 / As + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: as引导方式状语从句，表示'按照……的方式'。从句内容多为真实的。
example: Do as I told you. / As you know, I am a teacher. / Please do it as I do. / Leave it as it is.

name: As if/As though-方式状语从句
template: 主语 + 动词 + as if/though + 从句
usageNote: as if/though引导方式状语从句，表示虚拟的方式。从句用虚拟语气(与现在相反用过去式，与过去相反用过去完成式)。
example: He acted as if/though nothing had happened. / She treats me as if I were a child. / He speaks as though he were an expert.
variants: as if/though + 不定式：He opened his mouth as if to say something.

name: Like-方式状语从句(非正式)
template: 主句 + like + 名词/代词/从句
usageNote: like作连词引导方式状语从句为非正式用法，口语中常见。规范用法应用as或as if/though。
example: Do it like I told you.(非正式) / She sings like her mother does.(非正式) / He talks like he knows everything.(非正式)
variants: 规范用法：Do it as I told you.

name: 状语从句省略(主语+be)
template: 连词 + (主语 + be) + 形容词/分词/介词短语 + , + 主句
coreWords: when, while, if, unless, although, though, as
function: 状语从句中省略主语和be动词
usageNote: 当状语从句的主语与主句主语一致，且从句谓语含有be动词时，可省略主语和be动词。
example: When (he was) young, he liked music. / If (it is) possible, come early. / While (I was) walking, I saw a cat.
variants: Once (it is) published, the book will be popular.

name: While/Whereas-对比状语从句
usageNote: while/whereas引导对比状语从句，强调前后对比。
example: Some people like coffee, while others prefer tea. / He is outgoing, while his brother is shy. / Tom is hard-working, whereas John is lazy.

name: The first/last time-时间状语从句
template: The first/last/next time + (that) + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: the first/last/next time等名词短语可作连词引导时间状语从句，that常省略。
example: The first time I saw her, I liked her. / The last time we met, he was happy. / Next time you come, please call first.

name: Immediately/Directly-时间状语从句
template: 主句 + immediately/directly + 从句 / Immediately/Directly + 从句 + , + 主句
usageNote: immediately, directly, instantly等副词可作连词，相当于as soon as。
example: I recognized him immediately I saw him. / Directly he arrived, he started working. / I told him instantly he came in.

name: By the time-时间状语从句
template: By the time + (that) + 从句 + , + 主句(完成时)
usageNote: by the time引导时间状语从句，主句常用完成时态。
example: By the time he arrived, the meeting had started. / By the time you read this, I will have left. / By the time she finished, it was dark.
variants: By the time + 一般现在时, 主句 + 将来完成时

name: Since(既然/因为)-原因与Since(自从)-时间辨析
usageNote: since作时间连词时，主句常用完成时，从句用过去时；作原因连词时，主句不限时态。
example: I have lived here since I was a child.(时间) / Since you are busy, I will leave.(原因) / Since it is late, let's go.(原因)
variants: 可通过主句时态判断：完成时多为时间，任意时态多为原因

name: 条件状语从句中的时态规则(主将从现)
template: If/When/Unless/As soon as + 一般现在时 + , + 一般将来时
coreWords: if, when, unless, as, soon, before, after, until
function: 条件/时间状语从句中用一般现在时代替一般将来时
usageNote: 在时间、条件、让步状语从句中，用一般现在时(或现在完成时)代替一般将来时。
example: If it rains, I will stay home. / When he comes, tell him to wait. / Unless you hurry, you will be late. / I will call you as soon as I arrive.
variants: 在时间/条件从句中，用现在完成时代替将来完成时：I will tell him when I have seen him.

name: Be surprised/amazed/shocked被动情感构式
template: 主语 + be surprised/amazed/shocked + at/by + 名词/to do/that从句
coreWords: be(v.), surprised(a.), amazed(a.), shocked(a.), surprise(n./v.), amaze(v.), shock(n./v.)
usageNote: be surprised/amazed/shocked at/by + 名词/动名词；be surprised/amazed/shocked to do；be surprised/amazed/shocked that + 从句。
example: I was surprised at the news. / She was amazed to see him. / We were shocked that he lied. / He was surprised by her reaction.

name: There is no doubt that-存在确定构式
template: There is no doubt that + 从句
usageNote: there is no doubt that后接同位语从句，表示确定的事实。
example: There is no doubt that he will win. / There is no doubt that she is right. / There is no doubt that it will rain.
variants: There is no doubt about + 名词：There is no doubt about his honesty.

name: There is a chance/possibility that-存在可能构式
template: There is a chance/possibility that + 从句
usageNote: there is a chance/possibility that后接同位语从句，表示可能性。
example: There is a chance that he will come. / There is a possibility that it will snow. / There is little chance that we win.
variants: There is a possibility of + 名词/动名词

name: There being-独立主格存在构式
template: There being + 名词 + , + 主句
function: 独立主格结构，表示'因为有/由于有'
usageNote: there being构成独立主格，作原因状语，常用于书面语。
example: There being no bus, we had to walk home. / There being nothing else to do, we went home. / There being some problems, we stopped.
variants: With + 名词 + being/doing/done：With there being no hope, he gave up.

name: It is/was...that-强调句(指物/事)
template: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that + 句子剩余部分
function: 强调句子的某一成分(主语/宾语/状语)
usageNote: 强调句去掉It is/was...that后，剩余部分应能组成完整句子。可强调除谓语外的大多数成分。
example: It was yesterday that I met him. / It is English that he teaches. / It was in Beijing that I first saw her.
variants: 被强调部分为状语时：It was in 2008 that the Olympics were held.

name: It is/was...who-强调句(指人)
template: It is/was + 被强调人 + who/that + 句子剩余部分
usageNote: 强调人时可用who或that。被强调人作主语时用who，作宾语时也可用whom(正式)。
example: It is Tom who broke the window. / It was my mother who taught me English. / It was him that I saw.
variants: 强调宾语时也可用that/whom：It was Tom that/whom I met yesterday.

name: 疑问词强调句
template: 疑问词 + is/was + it + that + 句子剩余部分?
coreWords: what, who, where, when, why, how, which, that(conj.)
function: 对特殊疑问句进行强调
usageNote: 特殊疑问句的强调结构：疑问词 + is/was it that...。
example: Who was it that broke the window? / What is it that you want? / Where was it that you met him? / Why is it that you are late?
variants: How was it that you succeeded?

name: Not until...强调句
template: It is/was not until + 时间 + that + 句子
usageNote: not until的强调结构：It is/was not until...that...。
example: It was not until yesterday that I knew the truth. / It was not until he came that we started. / It was not until midnight that he returned.
variants: Not until + 时间 + 倒装：Not until yesterday did I know the truth.

name: 强调句与一般定语从句/表语从句辨析
template: It is/was + 名词/形容词 + that/which/who + 从句
function: 区分强调句与定语从句/表语从句
usageNote: 去掉It is/was...that后，若能组成完整句子则为强调句；否则为定语从句或表语从句。
example: It was in this house that I was born.(强调句) / It was the house where I was born.(定语从句) / It is a pity that he left.(表语从句)
variants: It was on Monday morning that I met him.(强调时间状语)

name: Here/There/Now/Then + 完全倒装
template: Here/There/Now/Then + 谓语 + 主语(名词)
function: '这里/那里/这时/那时'，方位/时间副词置于句首引起完全倒装
usageNote: here, there, now, then等副词置于句首，谓语为come, go, be, lie, stand, exist等动词，主语为名词时，引起完全倒装。主语为代词时不倒装。
example: Here comes the bus. / There goes the bell. / Now comes your turn. / Then came the war.
variants: Here it comes.(代词主语不倒装) / There he goes.

name: Out/In/Up/Down/Off/Away + 完全倒装
template: Out/In/Up/Down/Off/Away + 谓语 + 主语(名词)
coreWords: out(ad.), in(ad./prep.), up(ad.), down(ad.), off(ad.), away(ad.)
function: 方向副词置于句首引起完全倒装
usageNote: 表示方向的副词(out, in, up, down, off, away等)置于句首，谓语为表示运动的动词，主语为名词时，引起完全倒装。
example: Out rushed the children. / Up went the flag. / In walked the teacher. / Away flew the bird. / Down fell the leaves.
variants: Off he went.(代词主语不倒装)

name: 介词短语+完全倒装
template: 介词短语 + 谓语 + 主语(名词)
coreWords: on(prep.), at(prep.), in(prep.), by(prep.), from(prep.), among(prep.), inside(prep.), outside(prep.)
function: 介词短语置于句首引起完全倒装
usageNote: 表示地点的介词短语置于句首，谓语为be, lie, stand, sit, exist, live等表示状态的动词，主语为名词时，引起完全倒装。
example: On the wall hangs a picture. / At the foot of the mountain lies a village. / In front of the house sat an old man. / By the window stood a desk.
variants: Among the guests was the president.

name: Never-部分倒装
template: Never + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语剩余部分
function: '从不/绝不'，否定副词置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: never置于句首时，句子需部分倒装(将助动词/be动词/情态动词置于主语之前)。
example: Never have I seen such a beautiful sight. / Never will I forget you. / Never did he tell a lie. / Never has she been late.
variants: Never before/Never again/Never in my life

name: Seldom/Rarely/Hardly/Scarcely-部分倒装
template: Seldom/Rarely/Hardly/Scarcely + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语
function: '很少/几乎不'，半否定副词置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: seldom, rarely, hardly, scarcely等半否定副词置于句首时，句子需部分倒装。
example: Seldom does he go to the cinema. / Rarely have I seen such courage. / Hardly had I arrived when it began to rain.
variants: Little did I know about it. / Nowhere can you find better roses.

name: Hardly/Scarcely...when/No sooner...than-部分倒装
template: Hardly/Scarcely/No sooner + 助动词 + 主语 + done + when/than + 从句
coreWords: hardly(ad.), scarcely(ad.), no(ad.), sooner(ad.), when(conj.), than(conj.)
usageNote: Hardly/Scarcely...when和No sooner...than结构中，hardly/scarcely/no sooner位于句首时主句需部分倒装。
example: Hardly had I arrived when it began to rain. / No sooner had I left than the phone rang. / Scarcely had she gone to bed when the phone rang.
variants: 不倒装时：I had hardly arrived when it began to rain.

name: Little-部分倒装
template: Little + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语
function: '几乎不/很少'，否定含义引起部分倒装
usageNote: little表示否定含义'几乎没有'时，置于句首引起部分倒装。
example: Little did I know about it. / Little did he care about what others thought. / Little have I seen such beauty.

name: Nowhere/In no way/At no time-部分倒装
template: Nowhere/In no way/At no time/By no means + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语
coreWords: nowhere(ad.), no(ad.), way(n.), time(n.), means(n.), by(prep.), in(prep.), at(prep.)
function: 否定意义的地点/方式/时间短语置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: nowhere, in no way, at no time, by no means, on no account, under no circumstances等否定短语置于句首引起部分倒装。
example: Nowhere can you find better roses. / In no way can he be held responsible. / At no time did she lose her temper. / By no means should you give up.
variants: On no account must this be mentioned. / Under no circumstances will I agree.

name: Not only...but also...-部分倒装
template: Not only + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语 + but + 主语 + also + 谓语
function: '不但……而且……'，not only置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: Not only...but also...结构中，not only位于句首时，其所在分句需部分倒装；but also后的分句不倒装。
example: Not only did he speak correctly, but he also spoke easily. / Not only is she clever, but she is also hard-working. / Not only did he finish, but he also won.

name: Not until-部分倒装
template: Not until + 时间/从句 + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语
function: '直到……才'，not until置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: Not until + 名词/从句位于句首时，主句需部分倒装。
example: Not until yesterday did I know the truth. / Not until he returned did we start dinner. / Not until she spoke did I recognize her.

name: Only+状语-部分倒装
template: Only + 状语(副词/介词短语/从句) + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语
function: '只有……才'，only+状语置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: only后接状语(副词、介词短语、状语从句)置于句首时，主句需部分倒装。only+主语不倒装。
example: Only then did I realize my mistake. / Only in this way can we solve the problem. / Only when he returned did we find out the truth. / Only Tom knows the answer.(主语不倒装)
variants: Only if you work hard will you succeed.

name: So+adj./adv.-部分倒装
template: So + 形容词/副词 + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语 + that + 从句
function: '如此……以至于……'，so+adj./adv.置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: 在so...that和such...that结构中，so + adj./adv.或such + 名词置于句首时，主句需部分倒装。
example: So fast does he run that I can't catch up. / So beautiful was the sight that we couldn't believe our eyes. / So tired was he that he fell asleep.
variants: So loudly did he shout that everyone heard.

name: Such+名词-部分倒装
template: Such + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语 + 谓语 + that + 从句
function: '如此……以至于……'，such+名词置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: such + 名词短语位于句首时，主句需部分倒装。
example: Such was the force of the explosion that all the windows were broken. / Such a clever boy is he that everyone likes him. / Such fine weather did we have that we went out.
variants: Such + be + 主语：Such is life.

name: As引导让步状语从句倒装
template: 形容词/副词/名词/动词原形 + as + 主语 + 谓语 + , + 主句
function: '尽管/虽然'，as引导让步从句必须倒装
usageNote: as引导让步状语从句时必须倒装，将表语(形容词/不带冠词的名词)、状语(副词)或动词原形置于as之前。
example: Young as he is, he knows a lot. / Hard as he tried, he failed. / Child as he is, he speaks English well. / Try as he might, he couldn't open it.

name: 虚拟条件省略if倒装
template: Were/Had/Should + 主语 + 谓语 + , + 主句
function: 虚拟条件句省略if，将were/had/should置于句首引起倒装
usageNote: 在虚拟条件句中，省略if，将were, had, should提至句首，构成部分倒装。
example: Were I you, I would go. / Had I known, I would have come. / Should it rain, we would stay home. / Had he studied harder, he would have passed.

name: May+主语+谓语-祝福倒装
template: May + 主语 + 动词原形!
function: 表示祝愿，may置于句首引起倒装
usageNote: may用于表示祝愿时，置于句首，主语后接动词原形。
example: May you succeed! / May God bless you! / May all your dreams come true! / May you be happy forever!

name: 表示否定意义的短语前置-部分倒装
template: Never before/Never again/At no time/In no case/Under no circumstances + 助动词 + 主语 + 谓语
coreWords: never(ad.), before(ad./prep.), again(ad.), no(ad.), at(prep.), in(prep.), under(prep.), case(n.), time(n.), circumstance(n.)
function: 否定短语前置引起部分倒装
usageNote: 表示否定意义的词或短语置于句首时，句子需部分倒装。
example: Never before have I seen such beauty. / At no time should you lose hope. / In no case should you give up. / Under no circumstances will I leave.
variants: On no condition/For no reason/To no avail

name: 省略主语+be(时间/条件/让步状语从句)
template: 连词 + (主语 + be) + 形容词/分词/介词短语
coreWords: when, while, if, unless, although, though, as, until
function: 状语从句中省略主语和be动词
usageNote: 当状语从句的主语与主句主语一致，且从句含有be动词时，可省略主语和be动词。
example: When (he was) young, he liked music. / If (it is) possible, come early. / While (I was) walking, I saw a cat. / Although (he was) tired, he kept working.
variants: Once (it is) published, the book will sell well.

name: 宾语从句中的省略(that)
template: 主语 + 谓语(动词) + (that) + 从句
usageNote: that引导宾语从句时，在口语和非正式文体中常可省略。
example: I know (that) he is honest. / She said (that) she would come. / I believe (that) you are right.
variants: that在介词后或并列宾语从句中一般不能省略。

name: 定语从句中的关系词省略
template: 先行词 + (关系词) + 从句(关系词作宾语/表语)
function: 定语从句中省略作宾语或表语的关系词
usageNote: 关系代词在定语从句中充当宾语或表语时可以省略，作主语时不能省略。
example: The book (that) I bought is good. / The man (whom) I met was kind. / He is not the boy (that) he used to be.
variants: 非正式文体中省略更常见。

name: 比较结构中的省略
template: 主语 + 谓语 + 比较级 + than + (从句中的重复成分)
function: 比较状语从句中省略重复成分
usageNote: 在比较状语从句中，与主句重复的成分常省略，有时连主语也省略。
example: He is taller than I (am). / She speaks English better than he (speaks English). / I have more books than (books that) you have.
variants: than后可接宾格：He is taller than me.

name: 虚拟条件省略结构(混合虚拟)
template: Had/Were/Should + 主语 + 谓语 + , + 主句(与另一时态虚拟)
usageNote: 混合虚拟省略if，将had/were/should提至句首。
example: Had I studied hard, I would be a college student now. / Were I you, I would have accepted. / Should it rain tomorrow, the match would be cancelled.

name: If虚拟条件-与现在事实相反
template: If + 主语 + were/过去式 + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + do
coreWords: if(conj.), were(v.), would(modal), should(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
function: 表示与现在事实相反的假设
usageNote: 从句用一般过去时(be用were)，主句用would/should/could/might + do。
example: If I were you, I would go. / If he knew the truth, he would tell us. / If I had time, I would help you.
variants: be动词第一三人称也可用was(非正式)：If I was you...

name: If虚拟条件-与过去事实相反
template: If + 主语 + had done + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + have done
coreWords: if(conj.), had(aux.), would(modal), should(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
function: 表示与过去事实相反的假设
usageNote: 从句用过去完成时(had done)，主句用would/should/could/might + have done。
example: If I had known, I would have come. / If he had studied harder, he would have passed. / If she had been careful, she wouldn't have made the mistake.
variants: 省略if倒装：Had I known, I would have come.

name: If虚拟条件-与将来事实相反
template: If + 主语 + should do/were to do/过去式 + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + do
coreWords: if(conj.), should(modal), were(v.), would(modal), could(modal), might(aux.)
function: 表示将来不太可能实现的假设
usageNote: 从句用should do(可能性较大)、were to do(可能性较小)或一般过去时。主句用would/should/could/might + do。
example: If it should rain tomorrow, we would cancel the trip. / If he were to come, what should we do? / If I saw him tomorrow, I would tell him.
variants: 省略if倒装：Should it rain, we would stay home. / Were he to come, what should we do?

name: 混合虚拟条件句
template: If + 主语 + had done(过去) + , + 主语 + would do(现在)
function: 从句与过去事实相反，主句与现在事实相反
usageNote: 混合虚拟中，从句和主句的时态不一致，分别针对不同时间的事实。
example: If I had studied hard, I would be a college student now. / If he had taken my advice, he wouldn't be in trouble now. / If you had followed the rules, you would be safe now.
variants: 也可从句与现在相反，主句与过去相反：If he were not so careless, he wouldn't have failed.

name: 含蓄虚拟条件句(with/without/but for/otherwise/or/or else)
template: Without/But for + 名词 + , + 主语 + would/should/could/might + do/have done
coreWords: without(prep.), but(prep.), for(prep.), otherwise(ad.), or(conj.), or else
function: 不用if，用介词/副词/连词含蓄表达虚拟条件
usageNote: without/but for(要不是)，otherwise/or/or else(否则)等可含蓄表示虚拟条件。
example: Without your help, I would have failed. / But for the rain, we would have gone out. / I was busy that day; otherwise I would have come. / Hurry up, or you will be late.
variants: Given more time, I could do better. (= If I were given more time...)

name: Wish虚拟-与现在事实相反
template: 主语 + wish + (that) + 主语 + were/过去式
function: '希望……(但不可能)'，与现在事实相反的愿望
usageNote: wish后接宾语从句用虚拟语气。与现在相反用一般过去时。
example: I wish I were a bird. / I wish I knew the answer. / She wishes she lived in Beijing.

name: Wish虚拟-与过去事实相反
template: 主语 + wish + (that) + 主语 + had done
function: '希望……(但过去没发生)'，与过去事实相反的愿望
usageNote: wish后接宾语从句表示与过去事实相反的愿望时，从句用过去完成时。
example: I wish I had known the truth. / He wishes he hadn't said that. / She wishes she had studied harder.

name: Wish虚拟-与将来事实相反
template: 主语 + wish + (that) + 主语 + would/could/might + do
function: '希望将来……(但不太可能)'，与将来事实相反的愿望
usageNote: wish后接宾语从句表示与将来事实相反的愿望时，从句用would/could/might + do。
example: I wish it would stop raining. / I wish he could come tomorrow. / She wishes she might see him again.
variants: hope不用虚拟：I hope he will come.(真实可能)

name: As if/As though虚拟-与现在事实相反
template: 主语 + 动词 + as if/though + 主语 + were/过去式
function: '好像/仿佛'，与现在事实相反的假设
usageNote: as if/though后接从句，与现在事实相反用一般过去时；与过去事实相反用过去完成时。若表示可能真实的情况，可用陈述语气。
example: He talks as if he knew everything. / She looks as if she were ill. / It looks as if it were going to rain.
variants: 可能真实时用陈述语气：It looks as if it is going to rain.

name: As if/As though虚拟-与过去事实相反
template: 主语 + 动词 + as if/though + 主语 + had done
function: '好像/仿佛'，与过去事实相反的假设
usageNote: as if/though后接从句，与过去事实相反用过去完成时。
example: He looked as if he had seen a ghost. / She talked as if she had known him for years. / He acted as if nothing had happened.

name: Would rather虚拟-与现在/将来相反
template: 主语 + would rather + (that) + 主语 + 过去式
function: '宁愿/希望'，与现在或将来事实相反的愿望
usageNote: would rather后接从句时，与现在或将来相反用一般过去时。
example: I would rather you came tomorrow. / I would rather he didn't go there. / She would rather I stayed here.
variants: would rather do(不带从句)：I would rather stay home.

name: Would rather虚拟-与过去相反
template: 主语 + would rather + (that) + 主语 + had done
function: '宁愿/希望'，与过去事实相反的愿望
usageNote: would rather后接从句时，与过去相反用过去完成时。
example: I would rather you hadn't done that. / She would rather he had told her the truth. / I would rather you had come yesterday.
variants: would sooner, had rather用法相同

name: It's (high/about) time虚拟
template: It's (high/about) time + (that) + 主语 + 过去式/should do
function: '该是……的时候了'，表示早该做而未做的事
usageNote: It's time后接从句时，从句用一般过去时或should do(should不可省略)。high/about加强语气。
example: It's time we went home. / It's high time you studied harder. / It's about time he should apologize. / It's time we left.
variants: It's time to do / It's time for + 名词：It's time to eat. / It's time for dinner.

name: Suggest虚拟-坚持/建议/要求/命令类动词
template: 主语 + suggest/insist/order/demand/require/request/propose + that + 主语 + (should) + do
coreWords: suggest(v.), insist(v.), order(n./v.), demand(n./v.), require(v.), request(n./v.), propose(v.), should(modal)
function: 表示建议、要求、命令等的虚拟语气
usageNote: suggest, insist, order, demand, require, request, propose, advise, command等动词后接that从句时，从句用should do(should可省略)。
example: I suggest that he (should) come early. / He demanded that we (should) finish on time. / The officer ordered that the men (should) advance.
variants: 此类动词的相应名词后同位语从句/表语从句也用虚拟：My suggestion is that he (should) come.

name: Important/necessary/strange虚拟-形容词+that从句
template: It is + important/necessary/strange/natural/essential/vital + that + 主语 + (should) + do
coreWords: important(a.), necessary(a.), strange(a.), natural(a.), essential(a.), vital(a.), should(modal)
function: 表示重要性、必要性、奇怪等情感后的虚拟
usageNote: It is important/necessary/strange/natural/essential/vital/urgent/imperative等+that从句时，从句用should do(should可省略)。
example: It is necessary that you (should) be present. / It is important that everyone (should) attend. / It is strange that he (should) say so.
variants: should有'竟然'含义时不可省略：It is strange that he should say so.

name: Purpose虚拟-for fear that/lest/in case
template: 主句 + for fear that/lest/in case + 主语 + (should) + do / 动词原形
function: 表示'以防/以免'的目的虚拟语气
usageNote: for fear that, lest, in case引导目的状语从句时，从句常用should do或动词原形(美式英语)。
example: She locked the door for fear that someone (should) enter. / He ran fast lest he (should) miss the train. / I wrote it down in case I (should) forget.
variants: lest较正式，从句常用should+动词原形或直接用动词原形

name: If only-虚拟感叹
template: If only + 主语 + 过去式/过去完成式!
usageNote: if only可独立使用，表示强烈愿望。对现在虚拟用过去式；对过去虚拟用过去完成式。
example: If only I were rich! / If only I had studied harder! / If only she knew the truth! / If only it would stop raining!

name: 情态动词+have done虚拟/推测
template: 主语 + must/can/may/might/should/ought to/could + have done
coreWords: must(modal), can(modal), may(modal), might(aux.), should(modal), ought(v.), could(modal), have(v.)
function: 表示对过去情况的推测或虚拟
usageNote: must have done(一定做了)；can/could have done(本能够)；may/might have done(可能做了)；should/ought to have done(本应该)；needn't have done(本不必)。
example: He must have been ill. / You should have told me earlier. / You needn't have hurried. / She might have forgotten.
variants: couldn't have done(不可能做了)；would have done(本会做了)

name: May虚拟-祝愿句
template: May + 主语 + 动词原形!
usageNote: may用于句首表示祝愿，是一种虚拟语气用法。
example: May you succeed! / May God bless you! / May all your dreams come true! / May you be happy!

name: Suppose/Supposing虚拟-假设句
template: Suppose/Supposing (that) + 主语 + did/had done/should do + ?
usageNote: suppose/supposing引导假设条件句，可表示真实或虚拟条件。
example: Suppose you won the lottery, what would you do? / Supposing he didn't come, what then? / Suppose you had a million dollars.

name: Insist虚拟-坚持/主张
template: 主语 + insist + that + 主语 + (should) do / 陈述语气
function: insist表示'坚持要求'时用虚拟，表示'坚持说/主张'时用陈述
usageNote: insist表示'坚持要求/坚决主张'(命令/建议)时，从句用虚拟should do；表示'坚持说'(陈述事实)时，用陈述语气。
example: He insists that she (should) come.(坚持要求) / He insists that he is right.(坚持说-陈述) / I insist that he (should) apologize.
variants: suggest同理：suggest(建议)-虚拟 / suggest(暗示/表明)-陈述

name: 错综时间虚拟条件句
template: If + had done(过去) + , + would do(现在) / If + did(现在) + , + would have done(过去)
function: 从句与主句针对不同时间的虚拟
usageNote: 错综时间虚拟中，从句和主句的虚拟时间不一致。
example: If I had taken your advice, I would be better now. / If I were you, I would have accepted the offer. / If he had left earlier, he would be here now.
variants: 错综虚拟可用without/but for表达：Without your help, I wouldn't be here now.

name: Had hoped/intended/planned/wished/thought-未实现的愿望
template: 主语 + had hoped/intended/planned/wished/thought + to do / that从句
coreWords: had(aux.), hope(v.), intend(v.), plan(v./n.), wish(n./v.), think(v.)
function: 表示过去未实现的愿望或打算
usageNote: had hoped/intended/planned/wished/thought表示过去曾希望/打算/计划/愿望/认为(但未实现)。
example: I had hoped to see you. / I had intended to come, but I was busy. / I had thought he would come. / We had planned to go camping.

name: Should have done虚拟-责备/遗憾
template: 主语 + should/ought to + have done
function: '本应该做(却没做)'，表示责备或遗憾
usageNote: should/ought to have done表示过去本应该做但未做，含有责备或遗憾意味。
example: You should have come earlier. / He ought to have told me. / I should have studied harder. / You should have been more careful.
variants: shouldn't have done(本不该做却做了)

name: Needn't have done虚拟-不必
usageNote: needn't have done表示过去本不必做某事，但实际上做了。
example: You needn't have hurried. / I needn't have bought it. / We needn't have worried about him. / You needn't have come so early.
variants: didn't need to do(不必做，也确实没做-陈述语气)

name: Would/should/could have liked/preferred虚拟-未实现的愿望
template: 主语 + would/should/could + have liked/preferred + to do / that从句
coreWords: would(modal), should(modal), could(modal), have(v.), like(v.), prefer(v.)
usageNote: would/should/could have liked/preferred表示过去本想做但未实现的愿望。
example: I would have liked to come, but I was busy. / I should have preferred to stay home. / I could have liked to see him, but he left.

name: 虚拟语气在宾语从句中的一般规律
template: 主语 + 动词 + that + 主语 + (should) do / did / had done
coreWords: suggest, insist, demand, order, require, request, propose, advise, command, recommend
function: 总结虚拟语气在各类从句中的使用规律
usageNote: 1. 坚持要求类(insist/order/demand/require/request/command)：should do(可省略)；2. 建议类(suggest/propose/advise/recommend)：should do(可省略)；3. 情感类(important/necessary/strange)：should do(可省略/不可省略表'竟然')。
example: I suggest he (should) come. / It is strange he should say so. / I insist he (should) apologize.
variants: 上述名词后的同位语从句/表语从句同虚拟

name: So/Neither/Nor+助动词-省略倒装
template: So/Neither/Nor + 助动词/情态动词/be + 主语
function: '……也一样/也不'，表示与前句情况相同
usageNote: So + 助动词 + 主语(肯定句，表示'……也一样')；Neither/Nor + 助动词 + 主语(否定句，表示'……也不')。
example: I like music. So does he. / I can't swim. Neither can he. / He is a student. So am I. / She didn't come. Nor did he.
variants: So it is with... / It is the same with...(主语既有肯定又有否定/既有be又有实义动词时)

name: 独立主格结构
template: 名词/代词 + 现在分词/过去分词/形容词/副词/介词短语 + , + 主句
coreWords: 名词/代词 + doing/done/adj./adv./介词短语
function: 独立主格作状语，表示时间、原因、条件、伴随等
usageNote: 独立主格结构有自己的逻辑主语，与主句主语不同。逻辑主语与分词为主谓关系时用现在分词；为动宾关系时用过去分词。
example: Weather permitting, we will go out. / The work done, we went home. / He sat there, his eyes closed. / Gun in hand, he stood up.
variants: with/without + 宾语 + doing/done/adj./adv./介词短语：With time going by, we grow older.

name: Find/Think/Consider/Make/feel + it + adj./n. + to do/that从句-形式宾语构式
