name: 宾语从句-I doubt whether
function: 宾语从句：表达怀疑或不确定
usageNote: 用于提出质疑或表达保留意见，适用于学术讨论
example: I doubt whether this policy alone can solve the underlying problem. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: I wonder if there is sufficient evidence to support this claim.

name: 宾语从句-Research shows that
function: 宾语从句：用研究/数据支撑论点
usageNote: 雅思Task 2学术论证的核心句型，增强客观性
example: Recent studies have shown that bilingual education enhances cognitive flexibility. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Evidence indicates that urbanization contributes to environmental degradation. / Data suggests a strong correlation between income and health outcomes.

name: 宾语从句-It is argued that
template: It is + 过去分词 + that + 从句（作主语补语/宾语）
function: 被动语态宾语从句：引用他人观点而不指明主语
usageNote: 学术写作中用于引述间接观点，体现学术中立
example: It is argued that economic growth should not come at the expense of the environment. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: It has been suggested that social media negatively impacts adolescent mental health. / It is claimed that online learning is equally effective.

name: 宾语从句-Experts predict that
template: N. + 预测类动词 + that + 从句
function: 宾语从句：引述专家预测或未来展望
usageNote: 用于讨论趋势和未来发展，增强前瞻性
example: Experts predict that artificial intelligence will revolutionize healthcare within a decade. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Analysts forecast that renewable energy will account for half of global power by 2050.

name: 宾语从句-find it adj. that
template: S + find/consider/think + it + adj. + that + 从句
function: 宾语从句：it作形式宾语，that从句为真正宾语
usageNote: 较复杂的宾语从句结构，用于表达对某事物的评价
example: Researchers find it concerning that literacy rates have stagnated in certain regions. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: I consider it regrettable that cultural traditions are being eroded.

name: 宾语从句-be aware that
template: S + be + aware/convinced/certain/confident + that + 从句
function: 形容词后接宾语从句：表达认知状态
usageNote: 用于明确表达确信或 awareness，增强语气
example: Policymakers should be aware that short-term gains may lead to long-term losses. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Scientists are convinced that climate change is accelerating. / I am confident that this trend will continue.

name: 表语从句-The problem is that
template: The + n. + is + that + 从句
function: 表语从句：用that引导从句说明主语的具体内容
usageNote: 雅思写作中用于明确界定问题或阐明事实
example: The problem is that resources are insufficient to meet growing demands. [语域：正式 | Task 2/通用]
variants: The fact is that inequality has widened despite economic growth. / The reality is that change takes time.

name: 表语从句-The reason is that
template: The reason (why...) is that + 从句
function: 表语从句：解释原因，注意与The reason...is because的区别
usageNote: reason后接that而非because为标准用法，雅思中应避免常见错误
example: The reason why many students struggle is that they lack proper guidance. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: The main reason for this phenomenon is that social values have shifted.

name: 表语从句-My view is that
template: My/One + n. + is + that + 从句
function: 表语从句：表达个人观点或立场
usageNote: 用于Task 2和口语Part 3中明确表达立场
example: My view is that governments should prioritize public health over economic interests. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: My suggestion is that schools should place greater emphasis on critical thinking. / One position is that technology liberates rather than enslaves.

name: 表语从句-The advantage is that
template: The advantage/disadvantage/benefit/drawback is that + 从句
usageNote: 雅思Task 2 advantages/disadvantages题型核心句型
example: The primary advantage of remote working is that it reduces commuting time. [语域：半正式 | Task 2]
variants: A major disadvantage is that social interaction becomes limited. / The benefit is that costs are significantly reduced.

name: 表语从句-What I mean is that
template: What + 从句 + is + that + 从句
function: 表语从句：主语从句+表语从句嵌套结构
usageNote: 用于解释或重申观点，使论述更清晰
example: What I mean is that education reform requires a systematic approach. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: What concerns me is that the policy may have unintended consequences.

name: 同位语从句-The idea that
template: The + 抽象n. + that + 完整陈述句
function: 同位语从句：that从句对前面抽象名词进行解释说明
usageNote: 雅思学术写作中用于解释概念、观点或信念的具体内容
example: The idea that money brings happiness is a widespread misconception. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The belief that hard work guarantees success is deeply rooted in many cultures. / The assumption that all students learn equally is problematic.

name: 同位语从句-The possibility that
template: The + 可能/事实类n. + that + 从句
function: 同位语从句：对抽象名词的具体内容进行说明
usageNote: 用于引述研究发现、理论或可能性，增强学术性
example: The possibility that climate change is irreversible demands immediate action. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: The fact that air pollution causes millions of deaths annually cannot be ignored. / The evidence that exercise improves mental health is compelling.

name: 同位语从句-There is evidence that
template: There is + n. + that + 从句
function: 同位语从句：There be句型+同位语从句
usageNote: 学术写作中引述证据或警示时常用
example: There is growing evidence that social media affects sleep quality. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: There is a real danger that biodiversity loss will accelerate. / There are clear signs that the economy is recovering.

name: 同位语从句-despite the fact that
template: despite/in spite of + the fact that + 从句
function: 同位语从句：用于让步状语中，fact后接同位语从句
usageNote: 让步论证的重要句型，使让步更加具体
example: Despite the fact that technology creates jobs, it also eliminates traditional roles. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: In spite of the fact that education is free, enrollment remains low in some areas.

name: 限定性定语从句-which/that指物
function: 限定性定语从句：对先行词进行限定修饰，which/that指物
usageNote: 雅思Task 1和Task 2高频句型，用于描述数据、研究、现象等
example: The study that was conducted in 2020 revealed significant findings. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: The policy which was implemented last year has shown positive results. / The data that supports this theory comes from multiple sources.

name: 限定性定语从句-who指人
function: 限定性定语从句：who指人，对人物进行限定描述
usageNote: 用于描述特定人群或研究者
example: Researchers who specialize in environmental science have reached a consensus. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Students who receive adequate support tend to perform better academically. / Educators who embrace technology can enhance learning outcomes.

name: 限定性定语从句-that/which决定因素
function: 限定性定语从句：修饰抽象名词，指出决定性因素
usageNote: 用于分析因果关系或关键影响因素
example: The factor that determines success is often perseverance rather than intelligence. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The aspect which matters most is the long-term sustainability of the project.

name: 限定性定语从句-the reason why
template: The reason why/for which + 从句
function: 限定性定语从句：why引导的定语从句修饰reason
usageNote: 用于解释原因，Task 2论述原因时极为常用
example: The reason why many species face extinction is habitat destruction. [语域：正式 | Task 2/通用]
variants: The main reason why people migrate is the pursuit of better opportunities. / The reason for which the policy failed was inadequate funding.

name: 限定性定语从句-the place where
function: 限定性定语从句：where引导修饰地点
usageNote: 用于描述特定地点的情况或特征
example: Urban areas where infrastructure is inadequate face numerous challenges. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Countries where education is prioritized tend to have stronger economies. / The region where the earthquake struck suffered severe damage.

name: 限定性定语从句-the time when
function: 限定性定语从句：when引导修饰时间
usageNote: Task 1描述数据时间特征时常用
example: The period when the economy experienced rapid growth lasted roughly a decade. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: There was a time when traditional skills were passed down through generations. / The decade when technological innovation accelerated transformed society.

name: 限定性定语从句-the method by which
template: The + method/way/means/process + by which/through which + 从句
function: 限定性定语从句：介词+which修饰方式/方法
usageNote: 学术写作中描述方法或途径时常用
example: The method by which data is collected significantly affects research validity. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: The process through which policies are developed should be transparent. / The means by which success is achieved vary across cultures.

name: 限定性定语从句-whose
template: n.（人/物）+ whose + n. + 从句
function: 限定性定语从句：whose表示所属关系
usageNote: 用于描述人或事物的属性或关联
example: People whose lives have been affected by pollution deserve compensation. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Countries whose economies rely on tourism were hit hardest by the pandemic. / Organizations whose goals align with public interest gain more support.

name: 限定性定语从句-countries which
template: Countries/People/Organizations + which/that/who + have + 过去分词
function: 限定性定语从句：修饰集合名词
usageNote: 用于概括某类群体的共同特征
example: Countries which have adopted renewable energy policies show lower emission rates. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: People who have experienced cultural immersion tend to be more open-minded. / Companies that have invested in employee wellbeing report higher productivity.

name: 非限定性定语从句-which补充
template: 主句, which + 从句, [主句续]
function: 非限定性定语从句：对先行词进行补充说明，用逗号隔开
usageNote: Task 1和Task 2中用于添加额外信息，不影响主句理解
example: The economy, which has grown rapidly over the past decade, faces new challenges. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: Education, which is often taken for granted, remains a privilege in many regions. / Technology, which was meant to connect people, sometimes creates isolation.

name: 非限定性定语从句-who补充
function: 非限定性定语从句：who引导，补充说明人物
usageNote: 用于介绍人物身份、成就或特征
example: The professor, who is an expert in linguistics, presented groundbreaking research. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: My mentor, who has published extensively in this field, offered invaluable guidance. / The researcher, who specializes in neuroscience, challenged conventional wisdom.

name: 非限定性定语从句-where补充
function: 非限定性定语从句：where引导修饰地点，补充说明
usageNote: 用于描述地点的附加信息
example: Beijing, where I was born and raised, has undergone tremendous transformation. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 2]
variants: The university, where groundbreaking research is conducted, attracts global talent. / My hometown, where traditional values still prevail, maintains a strong community spirit.

name: 非限定性定语从句-结果which
template: 主句, which + 结果/影响 + 从句
function: 非限定性定语从句：which引导结果或影响
usageNote: 用于阐明某事物的结果或影响
example: The results, which were surprising to many researchers, contradicted previous assumptions. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: The policy, which has had far-reaching consequences, reshaped the education landscape. / The findings, which challenge conventional theory, merit further investigation.

name: 非限定性定语从句-As引导（正如）
function: 非限定性定语从句：As置于句首，指代整个主句内容
usageNote: 雅思写作和口语中引述共识或已知事实的经典句型
example: As is shown in the chart, there has been a steady increase in online shopping. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: As we all know, education is the cornerstone of national development. / As has been mentioned, this trend is not without its drawbacks.

name: 非限定性定语从句-As can be seen
template: As can be seen/observed/noted + from + n., + 主句
function: 非限定性定语从句：As引导的常用学术表达
usageNote: Task 1描述图表数据的必备句型
example: As can be seen from the data, consumption patterns vary significantly across age groups. [语域：正式 | Task 1]
variants: As can be observed from the graph, there was a sharp decline after 2010. / As might be expected, developed countries show higher internet penetration rates.

name: 非限定性定语从句-which指代整句
template: 主句, which + 从句（which指代整个主句）
function: 非限定性定语从句：which指代前面整个句子
usageNote: 用于对前述内容进行评价或总结
example: Many young people prefer remote work, which is understandable given the flexibility it offers. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Governments have increased education spending, which is a step in the right direction. / Some argue that tradition hinders progress, which I find overly simplistic.

name: 介词+which-in which
function: 介词+which定语从句：相当于where，修饰抽象或具体地点/情境
usageNote: 学术写作中比where更正式的表达
example: The situation in which we find ourselves demands innovative solutions. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The context in which these decisions were made was highly complex. / The environment in which children grow up shapes their personality.

name: 介词+which-by which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示方式、手段或途径
usageNote: 描述方法、标准或程序时使用
example: The method by which data is collected determines its reliability. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: The criteria by which success is measured vary across cultures. / The means by which poverty can be alleviated are multifaceted.

name: 介词+which-for which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示目的或原因
usageNote: 用于说明某事物的目的或原因，比why更正式
example: The purpose for which the study was conducted remains unclear. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: The reason for which this approach was chosen was its cost-effectiveness. / The goal for which we are striving is a more equitable society.

name: 介词+which-to which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示程度或指向
usageNote: extent/degree等词后用to which，表示程度
example: The extent to which this policy has been effective is debatable. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The degree to which education influences income is substantial. / The point to which technology has penetrated daily life is remarkable.

name: 介词+which-from which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示来源
usageNote: 用于说明来源、起点或区别
example: The country from which most immigrants originate has changed over time. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The tradition from which this practice derives dates back centuries. / The data from which conclusions were drawn may be incomplete.

name: 介词+which-at which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示时间点或程度点
example: The rate at which technology is advancing is unprecedented. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The speed at which changes are occurring demands rapid adaptation. / The level at which students perform depends on multiple factors.

name: 介词+which-on which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示基础或依据
example: A solid foundation on which to build future progress is essential. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The assumption on which this argument rests is questionable. / The evidence on which the decision was based has since been discredited.

name: 介词+which-with which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示伴随或工具
usageNote: 用于描述方式或伴随条件
example: The tools with which we address poverty have evolved significantly. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The resources with which schools are equipped vary enormously. / The attitude with which we approach challenges determines outcomes.

name: 介词+which-about which
function: 介词+which定语从句：表示关于某事
example: There are several concerns about which experts remain deeply worried. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The issues about which there is most disagreement require further dialogue.

name: 时间状语从句-When
function: 时间状语从句：当...时，表示时间点或时间段
usageNote: Task 1和Task 2中描述时间关联事件的常用句型
example: When the data was analyzed, several patterns emerged immediately. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: When education becomes accessible to all, society as a whole benefits. / When students are adequately supported, their performance improves markedly.

name: 时间状语从句-While对比
template: While + 从句, + 主句（对比）
function: 时间状语从句：While引导对比性时间从句，表示'而/然而'
usageNote: 雅思写作中最常用的对比句型之一
example: While some people argue that technology isolates us, others believe it connects us. [语域：正式 | Task 2/通用]
variants: While developed nations enjoy high living standards, developing countries still struggle with basic needs. / While online learning offers flexibility, it lacks face-to-face interaction.

name: 时间状语从句-As（随着）
function: 时间状语从句：As表示'随着'，引导渐进性变化
usageNote: 描述趋势和渐进变化的经典句型，Task 1和2均常用
example: As technology develops at an unprecedented pace, traditional industries face disruption. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: As societies become more urbanized, mental health issues appear to increase. / As the global population ages, healthcare systems face mounting pressure.

name: 时间状语从句-Before
template: Before + 从句, + 主句 / 主句 + before + 从句
function: 时间状语从句：表示'在...之前'
usageNote: 用于描述先后顺序，强调前提条件
example: Before a conclusion can be drawn, all evidence must be carefully evaluated. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Before implementing any policy, governments should conduct thorough research. / It is essential to understand the context before making judgments.

name: 时间状语从句-After
template: After + 从句/动名词, + 主句
function: 时间状语从句：表示'在...之后'
usageNote: 用于描述事件的时间顺序和因果关系
example: After the experiment was completed, the researchers published their findings. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: After the policy was introduced, unemployment rates began to decline. / After years of economic stagnation, the country finally experienced growth.

name: 时间状语从句-Since（自从）
template: Since + 从句, + 主句（现完）
function: 时间状语从句：Since表示'自从'，主句常用现在完成时
usageNote: 用于描述从过去某时持续到现在的变化或状态
example: Since the policy was introduced in 2010, carbon emissions have decreased by 30%. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: Since the Internet became widely available, communication has been transformed. / Since the reform was implemented, educational outcomes have steadily improved.

name: 时间状语从句-Until
template: 主句 + until + 从句 / Until + 从句, + 主句
function: 时间状语从句：表示'直到...为止'
usageNote: 用于描述持续到某时的事件或需要等待的条件
example: Until more evidence is found, we cannot draw definitive conclusions. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The situation is unlikely to improve until fundamental changes are made. / Until recently, this issue received little public attention.

name: 时间状语从句-As soon as
template: As soon as + 从句, + 主句
function: 时间状语从句：表示'一...就'
usageNote: 用于描述紧密衔接的事件
example: As soon as the results are published, they will be made available to the public. [语域：正式 | 学术/通用]
variants: As soon as the problem was identified, measures were taken to address it. / Changes become visible as soon as the new policy takes effect.

name: 时间状语从句-Once
function: 时间状语从句：表示'一旦'，条件+时间的复合含义
usageNote: 用于描述条件达成后的必然结果，论证中很有力
example: Once the problem is identified, appropriate solutions can be developed. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Once students develop critical thinking skills, they become independent learners. / Once a species becomes extinct, the loss is irreversible.

name: 时间状语从句-Whenever
function: 时间状语从句：表示'每当/无论何时'
usageNote: 用于描述规律性、习惯性的时间关联
example: Whenever new data becomes available, researchers update their models accordingly. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whenever governments invest in education, long-term economic benefits follow. / History shows that whenever inequality rises, social tensions increase.

name: 时间状语从句-By the time
template: By the time + 从句, + 主句（常完成时）
function: 时间状语从句：表示'到...时候为止'
usageNote: 用于描述某时间点前已完成的动作
example: By the time the policy was fully implemented, public opinion had already shifted. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: By the time students reach university, their learning habits are largely formed. / By the time action is taken, it may already be too late.

name: 原因状语从句-Since（既然）
function: 原因状语从句：Since表示已知或显而易见的原因
usageNote: 用于引述双方已知的原因，语气比because弱
example: Since there is no consensus on this issue, further dialogue is essential. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Since the economy is growing at a slower pace, austerity measures may be necessary. / Since technology is constantly evolving, continuous learning is indispensable.

name: 原因状语从句-As（由于）
function: 原因状语从句：As表示明显或客观的原因
usageNote: 正式写作中常用的因果表达
example: As the global economy is becoming increasingly interconnected, local events have global consequences. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: As public awareness of environmental issues grows, consumer behavior is changing. / As the population ages, healthcare costs are expected to rise substantially.

name: 原因状语从句-Given that
template: Given that + 从句, + 主句
function: 原因状语从句：Given that表示'考虑到/鉴于'
usageNote: 学术写作中常用的原因表达，比because更客观
example: Given that resources are limited, priorities must be established carefully. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: Given that climate change is accelerating, urgent action is required. / Given that education is a public good, it should be accessible to all.

name: 原因状语从句-In view of the fact
template: In view of the fact that + 从句, + 主句
function: 原因状语从句：正式书面表达，强调事实依据
usageNote: 非常正式的表达，适用于学术写作和正式报告
example: In view of the fact that inequality is widening, redistribution policies deserve serious consideration. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: In view of the fact that mental health issues are on the rise, increased funding for services is justified.

name: 原因状语从句-Seeing that
template: Seeing that/Considering that + 从句, + 主句
function: 原因状语从句：基于某种事实进行推断
usageNote: 比because更委婉，常用于非正式论证
example: Seeing that traditional methods have proven ineffective, innovative approaches are needed. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Considering that young people are the future of society, investing in their education is paramount.

name: 条件状语从句-Unless
template: Unless + 从句（= if not）, + 主句
function: 条件状语从句：Unless表示'除非'，相当于if not
usageNote: 用于强调必要条件，常用于警示或建议
example: Unless action is taken immediately, the consequences will be irreversible. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Unless sustainable practices are adopted, future generations will suffer. / Unless all stakeholders cooperate, the project is bound to fail.

name: 条件状语从句-As long as
template: As/So long as + 从句, + 主句
function: 条件状语从句：表示'只要'，强调充分条件
usageNote: 用于表达正面条件，语气较为积极
example: As long as proper measures are implemented, economic growth and environmental protection can coexist. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: As long as there is political will, meaningful change is achievable. / So long as education remains accessible, social mobility is possible.

name: 条件状语从句-Provided that
template: Provided/Providing that + 从句, + 主句
function: 条件状语从句：Provided that表示'倘若/假如'
usageNote: 较正式的条件表达，常用于书面论证
example: Provided that sufficient funding is available, the project can be completed within two years. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Provided that all parties are committed to compromise, a resolution can be reached. / Providing that the data is accurate, the findings are reliable.

name: 条件状语从句-On condition that
template: On condition that + 从句, + 主句
function: 条件状语从句：On condition that表示'在...条件下'
usageNote: 较为正式的条件表达，强调条件的约束性
example: Financial aid will be granted on condition that recipients contribute to community development. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The agreement will proceed on condition that all terms are met.

name: 条件状语从句-Supposing
function: 条件状语从句：Supposing表示'假设/假使'
usageNote: 用于提出假设性情境，进行推理
example: Supposing that remote work becomes the norm, urban centers may see significant population shifts. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Supposing this trend continues for another decade, what would be the implications?

name: 条件状语从句-If necessary
function: 条件状语从句：If + 形容词等省略结构
usageNote: 简洁的条件表达，常用于建议或结论部分
example: Governments should increase funding for education if necessary to ensure equal access. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If possible, renewable energy sources should replace fossil fuels. / The policy should be revised if so required by changing circumstances.

name: 让步状语从句-Although
function: 让步状语从句：Although引导，表示'虽然/尽管'
usageNote: 雅思写作中最重要的让步句型，用于体现思辨深度
example: Although the evidence is limited, the preliminary findings are promising. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Although technology has brought many benefits, it also presents significant challenges. / Although education is widely available, not everyone takes full advantage of it.

name: 让步状语从句-Though
template: Though + 从句, + 主句 / 主句 + though
function: 让步状语从句：Though用法同although，可置于句末
usageNote: Though比although更灵活，可用于句末，口语中也常用
example: Though further research is needed, the current data supports this hypothesis. [语域：正式/半正式 | Task 2]
variants: The results are encouraging, though some limitations remain. / Education reform is essential, though implementation poses challenges.

name: 让步状语从句-Even if/though
template: Even if/though + 从句, + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：Even if/though强调极端情况
usageNote: 用于加强让步语气，even if假设性更强
example: Even if this approach proves effective, it should not be the only solution. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Even though the benefits are clear, many people resist change. / Even if we act now, some damage is already irreversible.

name: 让步状语从句-While it is true
template: While it is true that + 从句, + it is also true that + 从句
function: 让步状语从句：While it is true that... 平衡论证结构
usageNote: 雅思Task 2平衡型论证的核心句型
example: While it is true that technology creates employment opportunities, it is also true that it displaces traditional jobs. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: While it is true that cities offer better amenities, it is equally true that they face greater environmental challenges.

name: 让步状语从句-No matter
template: No matter + wh-词 + 从句, + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：No matter + 疑问词，表示'无论'
usageNote: 用于表达不受条件影响的坚定立场
example: No matter what challenges arise, commitment to education must remain steadfast. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: No matter how difficult the situation may be, progress is always possible. / No matter where one lives, access to quality education should be guaranteed.

name: 让步状语从句-Whatever
function: 让步状语从句：疑问词+ever引导让步
usageNote: 强调任何情况下的不变立场
example: Whatever the outcome, the research itself has generated valuable insights. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whoever is responsible, accountability must be established. / However difficult it may seem, sustainable development is achievable.

name: 让步状语从句-Admittedly
template: Admittedly, + 从句. + However/Nevertheless, + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：Admittedly引导让步承认
usageNote: 先承认某事实，再转折提出不同看法
example: Admittedly, economic growth has improved living standards. However, this has come at a significant environmental cost. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Admittedly, online education offers flexibility. Nevertheless, it cannot fully replace face-to-face interaction.

name: 让步状语从句-Despite the fact
template: Despite/In spite of + the fact that + 从句, + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：介词+the fact that引导让步
usageNote: 比although更正式，适合学术写作
example: Despite the fact that funding has increased, educational outcomes remain uneven. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: In spite of the fact that awareness has grown, behavior change remains limited.

name: 让步状语从句-Notwithstanding
template: Notwithstanding + n./that + 从句, + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：Notwithstanding表示'尽管'，最正式
usageNote: 法律和高学术写作中使用的最高级让步表达
example: Notwithstanding the progress that has been made, significant gaps remain. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: Notwithstanding that the evidence is preliminary, the implications warrant attention.

name: 让步状语从句-Granted
template: Granted, + 从句. + Yet/But + 主句
function: 让步状语从句：Granted表示'诚然/就算'
usageNote: 先承认论点部分正确，再提出反驳
example: Granted, traditional education has its limitations. Yet, it also provides irreplaceable social experiences. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Granted, economic development is important. But it should not come at the expense of cultural heritage.

name: 目的状语从句-So that
template: 主句 + so that + 从句（can/could/may/might）
function: 目的状语从句：So that表示'以便/为了'
usageNote: 正式写作中表达目的的经典句型，注意后接情态动词
example: Investment in infrastructure should be increased so that rural areas can develop sustainably. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Schools should update their curricula so that students are better prepared for the future. / The study was designed so that results could be generalized.

name: 目的状语从句-In order that
template: 主句 + in order that + 从句
function: 目的状语从句：In order that比so that更正式
usageNote: 学术写作中正式表达目的的句型
example: In order that everyone can benefit from economic growth, inclusive policies are necessary. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Regulations were introduced in order that consumer rights might be protected.

name: 目的状语从句-So as to
template: 主句 + so as to + 动词原形
function: 目的状语从句：So as to + 不定式表示目的
usageNote: 简洁的目的表达，比in order to更简洁
example: Governments should invest in public transportation so as to reduce traffic congestion. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Companies are adopting flexible work arrangements so as to improve employee satisfaction. / Schools should diversify teaching methods so as to accommodate different learning styles.

name: 目的状语从句-In order to
template: In order to + v., + 主句
function: 目的状语从句：In order to + 不定式，可置于句首
usageNote: 最常用的目的表达，可置于句首或句中
example: In order to reduce carbon emissions, governments must invest in renewable energy. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: In order to address inequality, comprehensive social policies are required. / Measures were introduced in order to improve public safety.

name: 目的状语从句-For the purpose of
template: For the purpose of + n./-ing, + 主句
function: 目的状语从句：For the purpose of后接名词或动名词
usageNote: 学术写作中常用的目的表达，较为正式
example: For the purpose of comparison, data from both groups were analyzed simultaneously. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: For the purpose of this study, three key variables were selected. / The survey was conducted for the purpose of identifying consumer preferences.

name: 目的状语从句-With the aim of
template: With the aim/goal/objective of + -ing, + 主句
function: 目的状语从句：With the aim of强调明确的目标
usageNote: 用于描述有计划、有目标的行为
example: With the aim of improving healthcare access, mobile clinics were deployed to remote areas. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The program was launched with the goal of reducing youth unemployment. / With the objective of promoting cultural exchange, student mobility programs were expanded.

name: 目的状语从句-With a view to
template: With a view to + -ing, + 主句
function: 目的状语从句：With a view to表示'着眼于/旨在'
usageNote: 英式英语中较正式的目的表达
example: With a view to enhancing educational quality, teacher training programs were reformed. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: Policies were designed with a view to achieving sustainable development goals.

name: 结果状语从句-So...that
function: 结果状语从句：So...that表示'如此...以至于'
usageNote: 强调程度导致某种结果的句型
example: The pace of technological change is so rapid that many struggle to keep up. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Air pollution in some cities is so severe that outdoor activities become hazardous. / The benefits of exercise are so substantial that it should be part of daily routine.

name: 结果状语从句-Such...that
template: Such + (a/an) + adj. + n. + that + 从句
function: 结果状语从句：Such...that表示'如此的...以至于'
example: Social media exerts such a powerful influence that it shapes public opinion significantly. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: There is such a pressing need for reform that delay is no longer an option. / The project made such rapid progress that expectations were exceeded.

name: 结果状语从句-So much so that
template: 主句, so much so that + 从句
function: 结果状语从句：So much so that强调程度之深
usageNote: 用于进一步强调前述内容的程度
example: The policy has been successful, so much so that other countries are considering similar measures. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Education transforms lives, so much so that it is often called the great equalizer. / The issue has gained public attention, so much so that it is now a political priority.

name: 结果状语从句-To the extent that
template: 主句 + to the extent that + 从句
function: 结果状语从句：To the extent that表示'达到...的程度'
usageNote: 学术写作中用于精确限定程度
example: The economy has recovered to the extent that unemployment is now at historic lows. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Technology has permeated education to the extent that traditional classrooms are being redefined.

name: 结果状语从句-With the result that
template: 主句, with the result that + 从句
function: 结果状语从句：With the result that表示结果
example: Investment in early education was cut, with the result that achievement gaps widened. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Demand for healthcare services increased dramatically, with the result that waiting times extended significantly.

name: 结果状语从句-Thus/Hence
template: 主句, + thus/hence/consequently + 从句/句子
function: 结果状语从句：副词连接词表示结果
usageNote: 学术写作中常用的结果衔接词
example: The policy was poorly implemented; consequently, its intended effects were not achieved. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Funding was reduced, thus limiting the scope of the research project. / Urbanization accelerated, hence putting pressure on infrastructure.

name: 比较状语从句-as...as
function: 比较状语从句：As...as表示同级比较
usageNote: 表示两者在某方面相等
example: Remote work can be as productive as office-based work, provided that proper tools are available. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The benefits of exercise are as significant for mental health as they are for physical health. / The second proposal is not as comprehensive as the first one is.

name: 比较状语从句-not as/so...as
template: not as/so + adj./adv. + as + 从句
function: 比较状语从句：否定同级比较
usageNote: 表示某事物在某方面不如另一事物
example: Traditional media is not as influential as it once was. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Online courses are not so effective as face-to-face instruction for certain subjects. / The results were not as promising as researchers had hoped.

name: 比较状语从句-The more...the more
template: The + 比较级 + 从句, the + 比较级 + 从句
function: 比较状语从句：越...越...的结构
usageNote: 用于表达两个变量之间的正比或反比关系
example: The more accessible education becomes, the more equitable society will be. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The earlier children are exposed to languages, the more proficient they become. / The more governments invest in research, the greater the innovation output.

name: 比较状语从句-compared with
function: 比较状语从句：Compared with引导比较
usageNote: Task 1和2中用于引出对比对象
example: Compared with previous decades, current literacy rates have improved substantially. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: Compared to developed nations, developing countries allocate fewer resources to healthcare. / Compared with urban areas, rural regions face distinct challenges.

name: 比较状语从句-in contrast to
template: In contrast to + n., + 主句
function: 比较状语从句：In contrast to表示对比
usageNote: 用于强调差异，比compared with更强调反差
example: In contrast to popular belief, money is not the primary motivator for most employees. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: In contrast to traditional methods, modern techniques offer greater precision. / In contrast to expectations, the results were largely negative.

name: 比较状语从句-whereas
function: 比较状语从句：Whereas表示对比，连接两个平行分句
usageNote: Task 2中用于对比两种不同观点或情况的经典句型
example: Some countries prioritize economic growth, whereas others focus on environmental sustainability. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Urban areas attract young professionals, whereas rural regions tend to lose working-age populations. / Whereas developed countries face aging populations, developing nations have youthful demographics.

name: 比较状语从句-while（对比）
function: 比较状语从句：While表示对比
example: Older generations value stability, while younger people prioritize flexibility and growth. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Public transport is efficient in cities, while private vehicles remain dominant in rural areas.

name: 方式状语从句-As（按照）
function: 方式状语从句：As表示'按照/如同'
usageNote: 用于引述已知或预期的方式
example: As we discussed earlier, education reform requires a multifaceted approach. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: As was expected, the policy had mixed results. / As the evidence suggests, prevention is more cost-effective than treatment.

name: 方式状语从句-As if/though
template: 主句 + as if/though + 从句（常虚拟）
function: 方式状语从句：As if/though表示'好像/仿佛'
usageNote: 用于比喻或假设性情境描述
example: The situation looks as if it were out of control, though recovery is still possible. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: He talks about the project as though he had firsthand experience. / The economy behaves as if it were immune to external shocks.

name: 方式状语从句-In the way that
template: In the way that + 从句, + 主句
function: 方式状语从句：In the way that表示'以...方式'
usageNote: 用于具体描述方式或方法
example: In the way that the Internet transformed communication, artificial intelligence may reshape work. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Education should adapt in the way that technology has transformed other sectors.

name: 方式状语从句-The way
template: The way + 从句, + 主句
function: 方式状语从句：The way引导口语化的方式从句
usageNote: 口语和非正式写作中常用
example: The way technology evolves, traditional skills may become obsolete sooner than expected. [语域：半正式/口语 | 口语Part 3]
variants: The way education is delivered has fundamentally changed in the digital age.

name: 混合构式-What从句+定语从句
template: What + 从句 + is + n. + 定语从句
function: 混合构式：名词性从句与定语从句嵌套
usageNote: 复杂句式，用于精确限定和深入阐述
example: What surprises me is the speed at which technology is transforming education. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: What concerns experts is the extent to which inequality has widened. / What excites researchers is the potential that this discovery holds.

name: 混合构式-It is not that...but that
template: It is not that + 从句, but that + 从句
function: 混合构式：否定前者肯定后者的对比从句
usageNote: 用于精确表达对比性立场
example: It is not that technology is inherently harmful, but that its misuse leads to problems. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is not that people lack ambition, but that opportunities are unevenly distributed.

name: 混合构式-The reason...is because（口语）
function: 混合构式：Reason与because的口语搭配
usageNote: 口语中常见但学术写作中应避免，应改为is that
example: The reason I prefer online learning is because it offers flexibility. [语域：口语 | 口语Part 1/2]
variants: The reason many people migrate is because they seek better opportunities.

name: 混合构式-rather than
template: 主句 + rather than + 从句/v.-ing
function: 混合构式：Rather than表示'而不是'
usageNote: 用于对比两种选择，强调前者
example: Governments should invest in prevention rather than wait for crises to emerge. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Students should develop critical thinking rather than merely memorize facts. / The focus should be on quality rather than on quantity.

name: 混合构式-not only...but also
template: Not only + 倒装部分, but + 主句 + also
function: 混合构式：Not only...but also引导的强调并列结构
usageNote: 雅思写作中用于强调双重优势或双重事实
example: Not only does exercise improve physical health, but it also enhances mental well-being. [语域：正式 | Task 2/通用]
variants: Not only is education a basic right, but it is also an economic necessity. / Not only does the policy reduce costs, but it also improves efficiency.

name: 混合构式-Not until...
template: Not until + n./从句 + did/助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 混合构式：Not until引导的倒装强调句
usageNote: 用于强调某事直到某时才发生
example: Not until recently did people fully realize the importance of mental health. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Not until the crisis escalated did governments take decisive action.

name: 混合构式-Had/Should/Were虚拟倒装
function: 混合构式：虚拟条件句的省略if倒装
usageNote: 高级语法结构，用于正式论证中的假设
example: Were the government to invest more in education, long-term economic growth would follow. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Had this policy been implemented earlier, the impact would have been less severe. / Should resources become available, the program could be expanded.

name: 主语从句-Whatever引导
template: Whatever + n./从句 + 谓语 + 其他
function: 主语从句：Whatever引导的主语从句
usageNote: 用于表达'无论什么'的概括性主语
example: Whatever measures are taken must be carefully evaluated for effectiveness. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whatever decisions are made will have far-reaching consequences. / Whatever approach is chosen should be evidence-based.

name: 主语从句-Whichever引导
template: Whichever + n. + 谓语 + 其他
function: 主语从句：Whichever引导的主语从句
usageNote: 用于在有限选择中表达任意性
example: Whichever solution is adopted, implementation will require substantial resources. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whichever policy the government chooses, public support is essential.

name: 宾语从句-whether...or not
template: S + doubt/know/see/understand + whether + 从句 + or not
function: 宾语从句：Whether...or not表示'是否'
usageNote: 用于表达不确定性，or not可后置
example: It remains to be seen whether the policy will succeed or not. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Researchers are investigating whether the new method is effective or not. / It is unclear whether the benefits outweigh the costs or not.

name: 表语从句-It seems/appears that
template: It seems/appears/looks + as if/though + 从句
function: 表语从句：It seems that/as if引导的表语从句
usageNote: 用于表达推测或表面现象
example: It seems that the trend toward urbanization will continue unabated. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: It appears as though the situation has improved, though underlying issues persist. / It looks as if further intervention may be necessary.

name: 同位语从句-doubt/question whether
template: There is some/little/no doubt/question + whether + 从句
function: 同位语从句：doubt/question后接whether引导同位语从句
usageNote: 用于表达对某事确定性的评价
example: There is no doubt that education is fundamental to social progress. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: There is some question whether the data accurately reflects reality. / Little doubt exists that technology will continue to reshape society.

name: 宾语从句-be + 形容词 + that
template: S + be + adj. + that + 从句
function: 宾语从句：be+形容词后接that引导的宾语从句
usageNote: 常用于表达确信、担忧等情感态度
example: Scientists are confident that renewable energy can meet global demand. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: I am convinced that early intervention produces the best outcomes. / Researchers are aware that their findings may be controversial.

name: 宾语从句-tell/show sb. that
template: S + tell/show/remind/inform + O. + that + 从句
function: 宾语从句：双宾语结构后接宾语从句
usageNote: 用于引述告知或展示内容
example: The data clearly shows us that prevention is more effective than treatment. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: The survey reminds us that public opinion can shift rapidly. / Evidence informs us that the situation is more complex than assumed.

name: 主语从句-It is likely that
template: It is + 概率adj. + that + 从句
function: 主语从句：It作形式主语+概率形容词
example: It is likely that automation will displace certain job categories. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is probable that the trend will continue in the foreseeable future. / It is possible that new technologies will create unforeseen challenges.

name: 同位语从句-The question is
template: The question/issue/debate is + wh-词 + 从句
function: 同位语从句：The question is后接从句说明问题内容
usageNote: 用于引出核心议题或讨论焦点
example: The question is whether short-term economic gains justify long-term environmental damage. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The issue is how to balance individual freedom with collective responsibility. / The debate is not about if but about when change will occur.

name: 主语从句-It is a pity/shame that
template: It is + a pity/a shame/a fact/a wonder + that + 从句
function: 主语从句：评价性名词+that从句
example: It is a pity that many students graduate without practical skills. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: It is a shame that cultural traditions are being forgotten. / It is no wonder that countries with strong education systems prosper.

name: 限定性定语从句-all/everything that
function: 限定性定语从句：不定代词后接that引导的定语从句
usageNote: 用于强调全部或没有例外
example: All that glitters is not gold, as the saying goes. [语域：通用 | Task 2/口语]
variants: Everything that can be done to address this issue should be prioritized. / Nothing that has been proposed so far seems adequate.

name: 限定性定语从句-the same...as
template: The same + n. + as + 从句
function: 限定性定语从句：The same...as表示同类比较
usageNote: 用于表示相同性或相似性
example: The same factors that drove growth in the past may not apply in the future. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Students should receive the same opportunities as their peers enjoy. / We face the same challenges that previous generations encountered.

name: 非限定性定语从句-both of which
function: 非限定性定语从句：介词/代词+of which/whom引导
usageNote: 用于对先行词进行数量或范围限定
example: The study examined two key factors, both of which significantly influenced the outcome. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: The survey included several demographic groups, most of which showed similar trends. / Three main issues were identified, none of which have been adequately addressed.

name: 定语从句-one of which
usageNote: 用于从群体中选取一个或多个
example: Multiple factors contribute to this phenomenon, one of which is technological disruption. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Several explanations were offered, two of which seem particularly compelling.

name: 非限定性定语从句-which is why
template: 主句, which is why + 从句
function: 非限定性定语从句：which is why引导结果说明
usageNote: 用于说明前述内容导致的结果
example: Many students lack financial literacy, which is why personal finance education is crucial. [语域：半正式 | Task 2]
variants: The policy was poorly communicated, which is why public support remained low.

name: 定语从句-介词+关系代词（人）
usageNote: 正式写作中修饰人物的高阶句型
example: The researcher on whom the project depended left the institution. [语域：高度正式 | 学术写作]
variants: The professor with whom I collaborated published groundbreaking findings.

name: 定语从句-关系副词替换
function: 定语从句：关系副词与介词+which的互换
usageNote: 了解两者的互换关系，选择更简洁或更正式的表达
example: The era in which we live (= when we live) is defined by rapid change. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The context within which decisions are made (= in which) affects their quality. / The reason for which he left (= why) remains unclear.

name: 定语从句-分裂定语从句
template: n. + , which/who + 插入语 + 从句
function: 分裂定语从句：关系代词后有插入语
usageNote: 用于在定语从句中添加补充信息
example: The report, which, it should be noted, has not been peer-reviewed, suggests alarming trends. [语域：高度正式 | 学术写作]
variants: The researcher, who, as mentioned earlier, is a leading expert, presented new findings.

name: 定语从句-embedded
template: n. + 定语从句1 + 定语从句2
function: 嵌入式定语从句：一个先行词带多个定语从句
usageNote: 复杂句式，用于多层次信息叠加
example: The study, which was published in Nature and which has since been widely cited, challenges conventional wisdom. [语域：高度正式 | 学术写作]
variants: The participants, who were all college students and who had volunteered for the study, received training.

name: 定语从句-reduced（分词短语）
template: n. + v.-ing/v.-ed + 其他（省略关系词和助动词）
function: 简化定语从句：将定语从句简化为分词短语
usageNote: 使句式更简洁紧凑，是学术写作的重要技巧
example: The factors contributing to (= that contribute to) this trend are multifaceted. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Students studying abroad (= who study abroad) often develop greater independence. / The policy implemented last year (= that was implemented) has shown mixed results.

name: 状语从句-Every/Each time
template: Every/Each time + 从句, + 主句
function: 时间状语从句：Every/Each time表示每次
usageNote: 用于描述规律性的时间关联
example: Every time a new technology emerges, traditional industries face disruption. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Each time governments cut education budgets, long-term economic prospects suffer.

name: 状语从句-Directly/Immediately
function: 时间状语从句：Directly/Immediately表示一...就
usageNote: 较正式的as soon as替代表达
example: Immediately the results were announced, debate ensued about their implications. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Directly the policy took effect, noticeable changes began to appear.

name: 状语从句-No sooner...than
template: No sooner + had + S + done + than + 从句
function: 时间状语从句：No sooner...than倒装结构
usageNote: 高级句型，用于强调两个动作的紧密衔接
example: No sooner had the reform been implemented than criticism began to mount. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: No sooner had the report been published than it attracted widespread attention.

name: 状语从句-Scarcely/Hardly...when
template: Scarcely/Hardly + had + S + done + when + 从句
usageNote: 与No sooner...than类似的倒装时间句型
example: Hardly had the new system been introduced when problems began to emerge. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Scarcely had the policy been announced when opposition groups organized protests.

name: 目的状语从句-lest
template: 主句 + lest + 从句（should + v.）
function: 目的状语从句：Lest表示'以免/唯恐'
usageNote: 较古雅的目的表达，现代英语中较少使用
example: Governments should act decisively lest the situation deteriorate further. [语域：高度正式/文学 | Task 2]
variants: Precautions must be taken lest the experiment should fail.

name: 比较状语从句-no more...than
template: no more + n./adj. + than + 从句
function: 比较状语从句：No more...than表示'和...一样不'
example: This approach is no more effective than the previous one was. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Online education is no less demanding than traditional classroom instruction. / The second proposal is no better than the first.

name: 条件状语从句-But for/Without
template: But for/Without + n., + 主句（虚拟）
function: 条件状语从句：But for/Without表示含蓄条件
usageNote: 用于虚拟语气中，表示若非某种条件
example: But for government support, many small businesses would have collapsed. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Without adequate funding, the project could never have been completed. / But for early intervention, the damage would have been irreversible.

name: 状语从句-Inasmuch as
template: Inasmuch as + 从句, + 主句
function: 原因状语从句：Inasmuch as表示'因为/鉴于'
usageNote: 法律和高学术写作中使用
example: Inasmuch as the evidence supports this conclusion, further investigation may still be warranted. [语域：高度正式 | 学术写作]
variants: The policy is justified inasmuch as it addresses a genuine public need.

name: 综合构式-It follows that
template: Given that + 从句, it follows that + 从句
function: 综合构式：It follows that表示逻辑推论
usageNote: 用于表达逻辑结论，增强论证严密性
example: Given that education reduces inequality, it follows that investment in schools benefits society as a whole. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Given that prevention is cheaper than cure, it logically follows that public health funding should be prioritized.

name: 综合构式-This is not to say that
template: This is not to say that + 从句. + Rather, + 主句
function: 综合构式：先否定极端解读，再提出修正观点
usageNote: 用于避免观点被误解，体现论证的细致性
example: This is not to say that technology should be rejected. Rather, it should be harnessed responsibly. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: This is not to say that tradition has no value. Rather, tradition and innovation should coexist.

name: 被动语态-It is believed that
template: It is believed/argued/assumed that + 从句
function: 被动语态：It is believed that表示普遍信念
usageNote: 学术写作中引述间接观点的最高频句型
example: It is widely believed that education is the key to social mobility. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: It is generally believed that early childhood experiences shape personality. / It is often assumed that economic growth benefits everyone equally.

name: 被动语态-It is estimated that
template: It is estimated/calculated/projected that + 从句
function: 被动语态：It is estimated that引述估算数据
usageNote: Task 1和2中引述数据预测的常用句型
example: It is estimated that global temperatures will rise by two degrees by 2100. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: It is projected that the population will reach nine billion within three decades. / It is calculated that the policy could save millions annually.

name: 被动语态-It is predicted/expected that
template: It is predicted/expected/anticipated/forecast that + 从句
function: 被动语态：引述预测或预期
usageNote: 用于讨论未来趋势和发展
example: It is predicted that artificial intelligence will transform the labor market. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is expected that demand for healthcare services will increase significantly. / It is anticipated that the reforms will yield positive results.

name: 被动语态-It is hoped that
template: It is hoped/wished/desired that + 从句
function: 被动语态：表达愿望或期望
example: It is hoped that the new policy will reduce inequality substantially. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is sincerely hoped that international cooperation on climate change will intensify.

name: 被动语态-It is suggested/recommended that
template: It is suggested/recommended/proposed/advised that + 从句(should)
function: 被动语态：引述建议或推荐
usageNote: 提出建议或方案时常用，从句常用should或动词原形
example: It is strongly recommended that governments invest more in renewable energy. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It has been suggested that school hours be extended to accommodate more activities. / It is proposed that a new regulatory framework should be established.

name: 被动语态-It is widely accepted that
template: It is widely/generally/universally accepted/agreed/acknowledged that + 从句
function: 被动语态：引述公认共识
usageNote: 学术写作中用于引用学术共识，增强论证权威性
example: It is widely accepted that human activity contributes to climate change. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: It is generally agreed that education is a fundamental human right. / It is universally acknowledged that health is a prerequisite for development.

name: 被动语态-It has been proven/shown that
template: It has been proven/demonstrated/shown/confirmed that + 从句
function: 被动语态：引述已被证实的结论
usageNote: 用于引述已确立的科学发现或研究结论
example: It has been scientifically proven that regular exercise reduces stress levels. [语域：正式 | Task 2/学术]
variants: It has been consistently shown that teacher quality affects student outcomes. / It has been confirmed that the treatment is effective in most cases.

name: 被动语态-It should be noted that
template: It should/must/needs to be + noted/emphasized/stressed/recognized that + 从句
function: 被动语态：提醒注意或强调
usageNote: 用于引导读者注意重要信息
example: It should be noted that these findings are based on a relatively small sample. [语域：正式 | Task 1/2]
variants: It must be emphasized that this is only one aspect of a complex issue. / It needs to be recognized that progress takes time.

name: 被动语态-It is reported/claimed/alleged
template: It is reported/claimed/alleged/announced that + 从句
function: 被动语态：引述报道或声明
usageNote: 用于引述媒体、他人或组织的声明
example: It is reported that the government plans to increase education funding by twenty percent. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is claimed that the new technology can reduce energy consumption by half. / It has been alleged that the data was manipulated.

name: 被动语态-It is feared that
template: It is feared/worried/concerned that + 从句
function: 被动语态：表达对某事的担忧
example: It is feared that without intervention, the ecosystem may collapse entirely. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is widely feared that automation will lead to mass unemployment. / It is concerned that inequality continues to widen despite economic growth.

name: 被动语态-It cannot be denied that
template: It cannot/could not + be + denied/ignored/disputed/overlooked that + 从句
function: 被动语态：双重否定强调不可否认的事实
usageNote: 用于加强论证力度，表达不可否认的事实
example: It cannot be denied that technology has revolutionized communication. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It cannot be ignored that poverty persists even in wealthy nations. / It could not be disputed that education drives economic growth.

name: There be+证据/原因
template: There is evidence/a reason/a possibility/no doubt that + 从句
function: 存在句：There be+抽象名词+that从句
usageNote: Task 2中引述证据或原因的经典句型
example: There is no doubt that education transforms individual lives and societies. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: There are several reasons why urbanization continues to accelerate globally. / There is a growing concern that inequality is widening.

name: There is a danger/risk that
template: There is + a danger/risk/possibility/chance/prospect + that + 从句
function: 存在句：There is a danger that表示存在危险
example: There is a real danger that traditional skills will be lost forever. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: There is a risk that the policy could have unintended side effects. / There is a strong possibility that the trend will continue.

name: 强调句-It is/was...that/who
template: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who + 句子剩余部分
function: 强调句（分裂句）：It is...that结构强调句中某成分
usageNote: 雅思写作中最常用的强调结构，可强调主语、宾语、状语
example: It is the government that should take primary responsibility for environmental protection. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is education that plays the most important role in social mobility. / It was in the twentieth century that the world saw unprecedented technological change.

name: 强调句-强调主语
template: It is/was + 主语 + who/that + 谓语 + 其他
usageNote: 用于突出动作的执行者
example: It is researchers who have the responsibility to ensure ethical standards. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is young people who will ultimately determine the future of society. / It was scientists who first raised the alarm about climate change.

name: 强调句-强调宾语
template: It is/was + 宾语 + that + 主语 + 谓语 + 其他
example: It is quality education that every child deserves. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is sustainable development that we should all strive for. / It was technological innovation that the country prioritized.

name: 强调句-强调状语
template: It is/was + 状语（时间/地点/原因）+ that + 句子
function: 强调句：强调时间、地点或原因状语
usageNote: 用于突出动作发生的时间、地点或原因
example: It is through education that true equality can be achieved. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It was not until the late twentieth century that environmental concerns gained political traction. / It is in developing countries that the need for investment is greatest.

name: 强调句-强调not...until
template: It is/was not until + 时间 + that + 句子
usageNote: 用于突出某事直到某时才发生
example: It was not until recently that people began to take mental health seriously. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It was not until the crisis escalated that governments took decisive action. / It is not until students reach university that they develop true independence.

name: 强调句-What...is/was
template: What + 从句 + is/was + 被强调部分
function: Wh-分裂句：What引导的主语从句+be+被强调部分
usageNote: 用于强调句子的主语或宾语，是强调句的变体
example: What matters most is not innate ability but sustained effort. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: What concerns me is the lack of adequate resources in rural schools. / What distinguishes successful people is their resilience in the face of failure.

name: 强调句-What I want to emphasize
template: What + 主语 + want to emphasize/stress/highlight + is + 被强调部分
function: Wh-分裂句：What I want to emphasize is
usageNote: 用于明确表达强调的内容
example: What I want to emphasize is that prevention is more effective than cure. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: What I would like to stress is the importance of early intervention. / What needs to be highlighted is the disproportionate impact on vulnerable groups.

name: 强调句-All that...
template: All/ The only thing / The most important thing + that + 从句 + is + 表语
function: 强调句变体：All that...is表示'所...的一切是'
example: All that truly matters is whether the policy achieves its intended outcomes. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The only thing that can address this challenge is collective action. / The most important thing that parents can do is provide emotional support.

name: 强调句-The person/thing/place/time
template: The + person/thing/place/time + wh-从句 + is/was + 表语
function: 强调句变体：用The+名词强调
example: The reason why this approach works is that it addresses root causes rather than symptoms. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The place where real change happens is in the classroom. / The person who deserves most credit is often the teacher.

name: 强调句-do/does/did
template: S + do/does/did + v.原形（强调谓语）
function: 强调句：助动词do强调谓语动词
example: I do believe that education is the foundation of progress. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: The government does have a role to play in regulating the industry. / We did see improvements after the reform was implemented.

name: 强调句-very+名词
template: the very + n. + 定语从句
function: 强调句：the very+名词表示'正是/恰恰是'
usageNote: 用于精确强调某特定对象
example: This is the very issue that policymakers have been avoiding. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Education is the very foundation upon which prosperous societies are built. / This is the very reason why reform is urgently needed.

name: 强调句-It is because...that
template: It is because + 从句 + that + 主句
function: 强调句：强调原因状语从句
example: It is because education empowers individuals that it deserves prioritization. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is because the evidence is so compelling that immediate action is warranted.

name: 强调句-not...but
usageNote: 用于否定前者肯定后者
example: The solution lies not in punishment but in rehabilitation and education. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Success depends not on innate talent but on consistent effort. / The issue is not lack of resources but poor allocation.

name: 强调句-never...but
template: 主语 + never + v. + but + 从句
function: 强调句：never...but表示'没有一次不是'
example: I never think about the future but feel a sense of responsibility. [语域：文学 | 高级写作]
variants: The policy never succeeds but it creates unintended consequences.

name: 强调句-On no account
template: On no account/Under no circumstances + 助动词 + 主语 + 动词
function: 强调句：否定副词前置引起倒装强调
usageNote: 用于强烈否定，语气极强
example: On no account should we ignore the warning signs of environmental degradation. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Under no circumstances can the safety of students be compromised.

name: 倒装句-Never/Seldom/Rarely/Hardly
template: Never/Seldom/Rarely/Hardly + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：否定副词置于句首引起部分倒装
usageNote: 高级句型，用于强调否定
example: Never before has technology developed at such a rapid pace. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Seldom do we consider the long-term consequences of our actions. / Rarely has a single policy generated so much public debate. / Hardly had the policy been introduced when criticism arose.

name: 倒装句-Never before
template: Never before + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：Never before强调前所未有的情况
example: Never before have humans faced such complex global challenges. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Never before has the world been so interconnected. / Never before have educational opportunities been so widely available.

name: 倒装句-No sooner...than
template: No sooner + had + 主语 + done + than + 从句
function: 倒装句：No sooner...than的倒装结构
usageNote: 强调两个事件的紧密衔接
example: No sooner had the reform been announced than opposition groups organized protests. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: No sooner had the new technology been introduced than it became indispensable.

name: 倒装句-Hardly/Scarcely...when
template: Hardly/Scarcely + had + 主语 + done + when + 从句
usageNote: 与No sooner...than同义的倒装时间句型
example: Hardly had the program launched when funding was cut. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Scarcely had the dust settled when new challenges emerged.

name: 倒装句-Only+状语
template: Only + 状语/状语从句 + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：Only+状语置于句首引起倒装
usageNote: 雅思写作中最常用的倒装句型之一
example: Only in this way can we achieve sustainable development goals. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Only when everyone participates will the plan succeed. / Only by addressing root causes can lasting change be achieved. / Only after careful consideration should a decision be made.

name: 倒装句-Only if/when
template: Only if/when + 从句, + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：Only if/when引导条件/时间倒装
usageNote: 用于强调唯一的条件或时间
example: Only if all stakeholders cooperate will the project achieve its goals. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Only when education becomes truly accessible will inequality be reduced.

name: 倒装句-Only recently/later/then
template: Only recently/later/then + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
example: Only recently have researchers begun to understand the full impact of sleep deprivation. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Only then did the government acknowledge the severity of the crisis. / Only later did we realize the significance of that discovery.

name: 倒装句-Not only...but also
template: Not only + 助动词 + 主语 + v., but + 主语 + also + v.
function: 倒装句：Not only...but also的倒装形式
usageNote: 强调双重事实时的高级句式
example: Not only does exercise improve physical health, but it also enhances mental well-being. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Not only is the policy ineffective, but it is also financially unsustainable. / Not only did the reform improve efficiency, but it also reduced costs.

name: 倒装句-Not until
template: Not until + n./从句 + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
usageNote: 强调某事直到某时才发生
example: Not until recently did people realize the importance of biodiversity conservation. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Not until the evidence became overwhelming did policymakers take action. / Not until all options were exhausted was the decision finally made.

name: 倒装句-So...that倒装
template: So + adj./adv. + 助动词 + 主语 + v. + that + 从句
usageNote: 强调程度导致结果的倒装句式
example: So rapid is the development of technology that regulations struggle to keep pace. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: So significant are the changes that traditional approaches are no longer adequate. / So demanding is the course that many students drop out.

name: 倒装句-Such...that倒装
template: Such + n./名词短语 + 助动词 + 主语 + v. + that + 从句
usageNote: 强调程度导致结果的倒装句式
example: Such is the complexity of the issue that no simple solution exists. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Such was the impact of the reform that other countries soon followed suit. / Such are the challenges facing modern healthcare that innovation is essential.

name: 倒装句-表语前置
function: 倒装句：表语前置引起完全倒装
example: Most important is the need for comprehensive education reform. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Equally significant is the role of government in regulating the market. / Especially noteworthy is the finding that early intervention produces lasting effects.

name: 倒装句-地点状语前置
template: 地点状语 + 谓语 + 主语
function: 倒装句：地点状语前置引起完全倒装
example: At the heart of this debate lies a fundamental question about equality. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: On the horizon looms a crisis that demands immediate attention. / Among the most pressing challenges is the need for sustainable energy.

name: 倒装句-副词前置（here/there/now/then）
function: 倒装句：方位/时间副词前置引起完全倒装
usageNote: 用于引起注意或营造戏剧性效果
example: Herein lies the fundamental challenge facing modern education. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: There remains much work to be done before equality is achieved. / Then came the realization that change was inevitable.

name: 倒装句-Under no circumstances
template: Under no circumstances/On no account/In no way + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：否定介词短语前置引起倒装
example: Under no circumstances should we compromise on food safety standards. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: On no account can the privacy of individuals be violated. / In no way does this excuse irresponsible behavior.

name: 倒装句-Little/Never/Nor
template: Little/Never/Nor/Neither + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
example: Little do we realize the long-term consequences of our consumption habits. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Nor should we underestimate the power of individual actions. / Neither is it advisable to ignore the warning signs.

name: 倒装句-In/At no time
template: In/At no time/For no reason/By no means + 助动词 + 主语 + v.
function: 倒装句：In no time等短语前置倒装
example: At no time was the public fully informed about the risks involved. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: By no means is this the only factor to consider. / For no reason should personal data be shared without consent.

name: 倒装句-Should/Were/Had虚拟倒装
function: 倒装句：虚拟条件句省略if的倒装
usageNote: 高级虚拟语气中的倒装结构
example: Should the situation deteriorate, emergency measures would be activated. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Were the government to invest more in education, the returns would be substantial. / Had the policy been implemented earlier, the damage would have been less severe.

name: 倒装句-as/though让步倒装
template: adj./n./adv. + as/though + 主语 + v., + 主句
function: 倒装句：as/though引导的让步倒装
usageNote: 将表语、状语或动词前置的倒装让步句
example: Try as they might, policymakers cannot please everyone. [语域：文学/高级 | Task 2]
variants: Difficult as the challenge may be, it is not insurmountable. / Child as he is, he demonstrates remarkable wisdom.

name: 倒装句-May表祝愿
function: 倒装句：May置于句首表祝愿
example: May future generations inherit a world that is more just and sustainable. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: May the lessons of history guide us toward better decisions. / May this research contribute to meaningful change.

name: 倒装句-程度状语前置
template: To such an extent/degree + 助动词 + 主语 + v. + that
function: 倒装句：程度状语前置引起倒装
example: To such an extent has technology permeated our lives that we can hardly imagine existence without it. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: To such a degree has inequality risen that social cohesion is now at risk.

name: 倒装句-Whether...or
template: Be + 主语 + A or B, + 主句
function: 倒装句：Whether...or的省略倒装（be it...or）
usageNote: 正式写作中的高雅表达
example: Be it through education or legislation, change is urgently needed. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Be the challenge large or small, every effort counts. / Whatever the outcome, the effort itself is worthwhile.

name: 倒装句-宾语前置
template: 宾语 + 主语 + 谓语（完全倒装）
function: 倒装句：宾语前置引起完全倒装
example: This we must never forget: education is the great equalizer. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: All these factors must be taken into account. / Such opportunities come only once in a lifetime.

name: 倒装句-so/neither/nor
function: 倒装句：so/neither/nor+助动词表示'也一样/也不'
usageNote: 口语和写作中常用的附和倒装
example: If the government fails to act, so too will the private sector remain inactive. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语]
variants: The first proposal was rejected, and neither was the second given serious consideration. / Technology enhances learning, and so does proper teacher training.

name: 倒装句-分词前置
function: 倒装句：分词短语前置引起倒装
example: Lying at the core of this issue is a fundamental disagreement about priorities. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Reflected in the data is a troubling trend that demands attention. / Standing in the way of progress are outdated attitudes and institutions.

name: 虚拟语气-If I were...,I would...
template: If + 主语 + were/过去式, 主语 + would/could/might + v.
function: 虚拟语气（第二类条件句）：与现在或将来事实相反的假设
usageNote: 雅思Task 2和口语Part 3中讨论假设性情况的核心句型
example: If I were the government, I would invest more heavily in education and healthcare. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: If resources were unlimited, every school could have state-of-the-art facilities. / If people were more aware of environmental issues, behavior would change.

name: 虚拟语气-If I had done...,I would have...
template: If + 主语 + had done, 主语 + would/could/might have done
function: 虚拟语气（第三类条件句）：与过去事实相反的假设
usageNote: 用于讨论过去本可以发生但未发生的事情
example: If the policy had been implemented earlier, the economic damage would have been less severe. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If adequate funding had been provided, the project could have succeeded. / Had the warning signs been heeded, the crisis might have been averted.

name: 虚拟语气-If I were to do...
template: If + 主语 + were to + v., 主语 + would + v.
function: 虚拟语气：If...were to do表示对将来的假设
usageNote: 用于讨论将来不太可能发生的情况
example: If the global temperature were to rise by two degrees, coastal cities would face existential threats. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If the trend were to continue at this pace, traditional industries would become obsolete within decades.

name: 虚拟语气-If it were not for...
template: If it were not for + n., 主语 + would + v.
function: 虚拟语气：If it were not for表示'要不是'
usageNote: 用于说明某事物的关键作用
example: If it were not for technology, remote work during the pandemic would have been impossible. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If it were not for early intervention programs, many students would have fallen behind permanently. / Life would be very different if it were not for the Internet.

name: 虚拟语气-But for...
template: But for + n., + 主句（虚拟）
function: 虚拟语气：But for表示'要不是/倘若没有'
usageNote: If it were not for的简化形式
example: But for the Internet, communication across borders would be much slower and more expensive. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: But for government subsidies, many small businesses would have collapsed during the recession. / But for early detection, the disease would have progressed unchecked.

name: 虚拟语气-Without...
function: 虚拟语气：Without表示含蓄条件
example: Without adequate preparation, students would struggle to meet academic expectations. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Without international cooperation, climate change would be impossible to address effectively. / Without access to education, social mobility would remain a distant dream.

name: 虚拟语气-It is time/high time...
template: It is (high) time that + 主语 + 过去式/should + v.
function: 虚拟语气：It is (high) time that表示'是时候...了'
usageNote: 用于表达紧迫感，从句用过去式
example: It is high time that we took decisive action against climate change. [语域：正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: It is time that governments prioritized mental health services. / It is high time that outdated practices were abandoned.

name: 虚拟语气-I wish...
template: I wish (that) + 主语 + 过去式/were/had done
function: 虚拟语气：I wish表示未能实现的愿望
usageNote: 口语和写作中表达遗憾的常用句型
example: I wish that more people understood the importance of preserving cultural heritage. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: I wish the government had acted sooner to prevent the crisis. / I wish education were accessible to every child regardless of background.

name: 虚拟语气-If only...
template: If only + 主语 + 过去式/had done/were
function: 虚拟语气：If only表示'要是...就好了'
usageNote: 用于表达强烈愿望或遗憾
example: If only more resources were allocated to scientific research. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: If only the policy had been better communicated to the public. / If only we had recognized the warning signs earlier.

name: 虚拟语气-as if/though（现在）
template: 主语 + v. + as if/though + 主语 + were/过去式
function: 虚拟语气：as if/though与现在事实相反的比喻
usageNote: 用于比喻或假设性情境
example: The situation looks as if it were completely out of control. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: He talks about the project as though he had firsthand experience with it. / The economy behaves as if it were immune to external shocks.

name: 虚拟语气-as if/though（过去）
template: 主语 + v. + as if/though + 主语 + had done
function: 虚拟语气：as if/though与过去事实相反的比喻
usageNote: 用于对过去情况的假设性描述
example: The official spoke as if nothing had happened. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: She treated him as if he had never made any contribution. / The results were presented as though the methodology had been flawless.

name: 虚拟语气-would rather
template: S + would rather + (that) + 从句主语 + 过去式
function: 虚拟语气：would rather表示宁愿
example: I would rather that the decision were postponed until more evidence is available. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Many citizens would rather that their taxes were spent on education than on defense. / I would rather that this issue were discussed openly.

name: 虚拟语气-would sooner
template: S + would sooner + (that) + 从句主语 + 过去式
function: 虚拟语气：would sooner表示宁可
example: I would sooner that the project were canceled than proceed without proper planning. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Employees would sooner that changes were introduced gradually.

name: 虚拟语气-suggest/order/propose that...should
function: 虚拟语气：should型虚拟语气，从句用should+动词原形或动词原形
usageNote: 正式写作中提出建议、命令或要求的重要句型
example: I suggest that the government (should) increase funding for public education. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Experts recommend that children (should) engage in at least one hour of physical activity daily. / It is proposed that the regulations (should) be revised.

name: 虚拟语气-It is essential that
template: It is + essential/necessary/important/vital/crucial/imperative + that + 主语 + (should) + v.
function: 虚拟语气：It is essential that后的should型虚拟
usageNote: 提出建议或要求时的高级句型
example: It is essential that every child (should) have access to quality education. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is vital that immediate action (should) be taken to protect endangered species. / It is imperative that the public (should) be informed about the risks.

name: 虚拟语气-It is requested that
template: It is + requested/required/requested/urged/advised + that + 主语 + (should) + v.
function: 虚拟语气：It is requested that后的should型虚拟
usageNote: 正式场合中表达要求或建议
example: It is strongly urged that all countries (should) ratify the climate agreement. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: It is required that all participants (should) complete the training program.

name: 虚拟语气-lest...should
template: 主句 + lest + 从句主语 + (should) + v.
function: 虚拟语气：lest表示'以免/唯恐'
usageNote: 较古雅但仍然正式的表达
example: Governments must act decisively lest the situation (should) deteriorate further. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Precautions must be taken lest errors (should) compromise the research findings.

name: 虚拟语气-in case...should
template: 主句 + in case + 从句主语 + should + v.
function: 虚拟语气：in case...should表示'万一'
example: Backup systems should be maintained in case the primary system should fail. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Emergency funds should be reserved in case the project should encounter unexpected costs.

name: 虚拟语气-for fear that
template: 主句 + for fear that + 从句主语 + should/might + v.
function: 虚拟语气：for fear that表示'以免/唯恐'
example: Some countries hesitate to implement reforms for fear that they might destabilize the economy. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: The policy was carefully phased in for fear that rapid changes should create public resistance.

name: 虚拟语气-whether...or（虚拟）
template: Whether + 主语 + v./be + 主语 + v., 主句
function: 虚拟语气：whether引导的让步虚拟
example: Whether the challenge be large or small, we must face it with determination. [语域：高度正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whether he succeed or fail, his effort deserves recognition. / Be the weather good or bad, the event will proceed as planned.

name: 虚拟语气-混合虚拟
template: If + 主语 + had done, 主语 + would + v.（现在）
function: 虚拟语气：混合条件句（过去→现在）
usageNote: 用于从过去条件推出现在结果
example: If the policy had been maintained, the economy would be in a much stronger position today. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If adequate investment had been made decades ago, infrastructure would not be crumbling now. / If he had studied harder, he would have a better job now.

name: 虚拟语气-混合虚拟（现在→将来）
template: If + 主语 + 过去式/were, 主语 + would be doing/would + v.
function: 虚拟语气：混合条件句（现在→将来）
usageNote: 从现在的假设推出将来的结果
example: If the government were serious about reform, we would see concrete action in the coming months. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If technology were truly democratized, future generations would enjoy unprecedented opportunities.

name: 虚拟语气-Otherwise/Or
template: If句（真实）, + otherwise/or + 主语 + would + v.
function: 虚拟语气：otherwise/or引出的含蓄虚拟
usageNote: 用otherwise/or代替if从句的结果部分
example: Governments must invest in education, otherwise the skills gap would continue to widen. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Immediate action is needed, or the damage would become irreversible. / We must adapt, otherwise we would be left behind.

name: 虚拟语气-supposing/suppose
example: Supposing the policy were implemented nationwide, what would be the expected outcomes? [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: Suppose there were no fossil fuels, how would society function?

name: 虚拟语气-Even if/though虚拟
template: Even if/though + 主语 + were/did/had done, 主语 + would + v.
function: 虚拟语气：Even if/though+虚拟语气
usageNote: 用于极端假设下的让步
example: Even if funding were doubled, the problem would not be solved overnight. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Even though the evidence had been available earlier, policymakers might still have delayed action. / Even if everyone agreed, implementing change would take years.

name: 省略句-比较从句省略
template: 主句 + than + 省略后的比较成分
function: 省略句：比较状语从句中的省略
usageNote: 避免重复，使句式更简洁
example: The situation is more complex than initially assumed. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Online learning is more effective than commonly believed. / The results were better than expected.

name: 省略句-if/when/while省略
function: 省略句：if/when/while+省略主语和be的分词结构
usageNote: 简化条件或时间状语从句
example: When properly implemented, the policy yields positive results. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: If given adequate support, most students can succeed academically. / While undoubtedly important, economic growth is not the only measure of progress.

name: 省略句-疑问词+to do
template: 疑问词 + to do（省略从句主语和谓语）
function: 省略句：疑问词+不定式代替从句
usageNote: 简洁地表达疑问或不确定性
example: The question is how to balance economic growth with environmental protection. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: What to include in the curriculum remains a topic of debate. / Students must decide whether to pursue further education.

name: 间接疑问句-I wonder if
function: 间接疑问句：疑问句作宾语从句
usageNote: 礼貌地提出问题或不确定性
example: I wonder whether stricter regulations would actually solve the problem. [语域：半正式 | Task 2/口语Part 3]
variants: I doubt if increasing punishment alone would deter criminal behavior. / The question remains how best to allocate limited resources.

name: 条件-Given/Provided/Assuming
template: Given/Provided/Assuming + n./that + 从句, + 主句
function: 条件表达：分词和连词表示条件
usageNote: 用于引出条件的正式表达
example: Given the current economic climate, austerity measures may be unavoidable. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Provided adequate safeguards are in place, the policy should be implemented. / Assuming the trend continues, demand will outstrip supply within a decade.

name: 条件-Without/But for
template: Without/But for + n., + 主句（虚拟）
function: 条件表达：Without/But for表示含蓄条件
usageNote: 虚拟语气中表示必要条件的结构
example: Without significant reform, the healthcare system would face collapse. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: But for international aid, the crisis would have been far more devastating.

name: 对比-Unlike/While/Whereas
usageNote: Task 2中对比两种观点或情况的常用句型
example: Unlike previous generations, today's young people prioritize work-life balance. [语域：正式 | Task 2]
variants: Whereas developed countries face aging populations, developing nations have youthful demographics. / While some embrace change, others resist it fervently.

name: While/Whereas... ,...
example: While developed nations have made substantial progress in reducing carbon emissions, developing countries continue to rely heavily on coal-fired power plants.

name: Nevertheless,...
example: The project faced numerous obstacles. Nevertheless, the team managed to complete it within the allocated budget and timeframe.

name: It is recommended that...
template: It is recommended that + [subject + base verb] (虚拟语气)
example: It is recommended that companies adopt flexible working arrangements to improve employee wellbeing and productivity.
variants: It is advisable that..., It is suggested that...,
